faqs.question: What are the career options offered at School of Interior Design, Jain Deemed-to-be University, Bangalore?
faqs.answer: School of Interior Design, Jain Deemed-to-be University, Bangalore offers BSc in Interior Designer. After pursuig BSc course students have the opportunity to work as Interior designer, Furniture designer, Exhibition designer, Architect, Production Designer, and others. It is one of the best career options as opportunity to work in various fields.

faqs.question: Can you elaborate on the BSc Design career?
faqs.answer: Sure, the BSc Design career scope is vast, with diverse career paths based on the specialisation you choose to study. It will offer you not just the theoretical knowledge but also help you gain creative and technical skills. You can even go for freelance opportunities once you gain relevant skills and experience in the industry.

faqs.question: Is it worth doing BSc from School of Interior Design, Jain Deemed-to-be University?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is worth to pursue BSc from School of Interior Design, Jain Deemed-to-be University. The institute offers Interior Designer a full-time, three-year BSc programme at the UG level. The curriculum focuses on the eminent features of our programme including immersive studio experiences as per the industry standards, enabling students to work in a professional environment.

The institute prepares the students for diverse career opportunities ranging from residential and commercial design. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college but the campus is very small.

review_content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide any placements. You have to get a job by yourself. An internship is mandatory in the 6th semester for this course so they have provided some companies. The college offers a list of companies to contact so that we can directly apply for internships. You can choose different roles in this course like a 2D designer, 3D designer, and site engineer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure for this course were good but the campus was very small. Classrooms, our library, labs, and washrooms wear neat and clean. I never stayed in the hostel. They don't have any sports and games facilities on the campus but they have sports quota which is directly connected with the university.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: One of the good known colleges for interior designing in Bangalore.

review_content.Placements: So far, we got nothing for us from college. We don't have interaction with our seniors because of difference in the college timings and some other reasons. About the internship from college, they update us for the interviews scheduled with the companies that the placement cell is connected with.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has no Wi-Fi facility. Our college has no playground, so there is no reason to speak about the sports and games. There is no separate place or something for the medical facilities, they do first-aid only. The classrooms are good. The library is not ready yet, no labs for us, we have studios only.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I like my course that's way I chose this course.

review_content.Placements: 70% of the students were placed in the college ad mostly in my course the most of the students came of the marketing there should having the difference choices, there the highest package for the course 6 lacs and the lowest is 3 lacs mostly student get placed form there.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure it's just okay ad food items and other was good u enjoy there hostel having 24hrs security they provide. Mess was also very clean and mostly student lives in hostel only. Library is so big, we can study there till complete night.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college to study as well as enjoy extra events.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college were good, and good companies visited our college for placements. I am doing a job which I got through campus placements with a salary of Rs. 30,000 per month. College got a couple of good companies and job opportunities. In our batch, 75% of the students got placed in many good companies with a good salary package.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good, huge and equipped with projectors. There is a good big canteen to hang out and eat. The library is also equipped with all well-referred authors. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. It has a huge parking lot, and campus infrastructure is also good.

paragraphs: School of Interior Design, Jain University admission 2026 is open. This institute is known for its full-time BSc in Interior Design programme. Admission to the School of Interior Design BSc course is entrance-based. Candidates have to appear for JET to get shortlisted for admission.

School of Interior Design course admissions 2026 for BSc in entrance-based. Check below the complete School of Interior admission process:Application:The mode of application is online. highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, PSGR Krishnammal College for Women ranks #7 under the category 'College'.

The TANCET 2026 application form is live until Apr 10, 2026, for PSGR Krishnammal College for Women admission to the MBA course. Also, the TANCET exam 2026 is scheduled for May 9, 2026.

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at PSGR Krishnammal College for Women are BSc, BCom, and MBA. The college offers these programmes to students at UG and PG levels. Further, the college offers these programmes for a duration of 3 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. KCW Tamil Nadu courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. review_content.General: The campus has reliable Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, and tidy smart classrooms. The central library is spacious with good seating, e-resources, and extended exam-time hours. Sports facilities include a ground, gym, and indoor games. A medical room and ambulance tie-ups are available. Hostel rooms are clean with adequate storage, water is available most of the time. The mess food is hygienic and average in taste, while the canteen has a better variety. Overall maintenance and security are good, and complaints are usually resolved within a day or two.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com in Financial Services - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, supportive faculty members, and great campus life.

content.Placements: 70 to 80 percent of students in my batch got placed through campus placements. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. The average package offered is 5 LPA to 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Deloitte, and Accenture. 60 percent of students also secured internships in reputed firms such as EY, Cognizant, and HCL. Top roles offered are software developer, analyst, finance executive, and consultant.
content.Infrastructure: Campus has good infrastructure with well-equipped classrooms, Wi-Fi connectivity, computer labs, and a central library with sufficient study resources, hostels are clean and provide decent facilities, with proper security and medical support. Mess food is average but hygienic, with a canteen available for variety, sports facilities like cricket ground, basketball, volleyball, and gym are well maintained,

individual_reviews.course: B.Com in Financial Services - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and decent placements with a supportive campus environment.

content.Placements: About 70-75% of students in my batch were placed. The highest package is around 12 LPA, the average hovered near 4.5 LPA, and the lowest is ~3 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, HCL, and a few startups, Deloitte visited for select roles. Roughly 60% of students got internships, mostly through the college CDC and alumni network. Roles offered included software developer, QA/Test engineer, data/business analyst, finance associate, and HR Trainee. The pre-placement training (aptitude, GD mock interviews) is useful.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has reliable Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, and tidy smart classrooms. The central library is spacious with good seating, e-resources, and extended exam-time hours. Sports facilities include a ground, gym, and indoor games. A medical room and ambulance tie-ups are available. Hostel rooms are clean with adequate storage, water is available most of the time. The mess food is hygienic and average in taste, while the canteen has a better variety. Overall maintenance and security are good, and complaints are usually resolved within a day or two.

admission_process.title: PSGR Krishnammal College For Women Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: PSGR Krishnammal College For Women admission 2025 is open. The college offers various UG, PG, and research courses in two categoriesAided and Self-financingsuch as BA, BSc, BCom, MA, MSc, and others. AtPSGR Krishnammal College For Women, the mode of application is online. Candidates can apply by visiting the official website of the college. For final selection, the basic eligibility is to pass the last qualifying exam. Candidates are offered direct admission based on the same. Read below to know more information related to PSGR Krishnammal College For Women admission along with course eligibility, and selection criteria is available in the following segments:
PSGR Krishnammal College For Women Admission 2025: Eligibility and Selection Criteria

PSGR Krishnammal College For Women admission to all the courses ismerit-based. To be eligible for admission, candidates must fill out the eligibility and selection criteria for their desired courses. The basic eligibility criteria forUGis to passClass 10 and Class 12from a recognised board, and forPG and PhDcourses, pass agraduation degreeand master's degree, respectively. After completing the eligibility criteria, candidates are required to apply online by visiting the college's official website for admission. To know more details about PSGR Krishnammal College For Women course eligibility and selection criteria, go through the table below:

Steps for PSGR Krishnammal College For Women Admission Process 2025

PSGR Krishnammal College For Women admission is ongoing on the college's official website. Interested candidates are required to fill out the admission criteria set by the college to get admission. Check below thePSGR Krishnammal College For Women admission process 2025:
Step 1:PSGR Krishnammal College For Women Application Process 2025
Candidates searching for admission to PSGR Krishnammal College For Women in any UG, PG, or PhD courses are required to apply on the official website of the college for admission.
Step 2: PSGR Krishnammal College For Women Selection Rounds

Candidates are required to pass Class 10 and Class 12 for admission to UG courses and pass graduation and master's degrees for admission to PG and PhD courses, respectively. It is required to fulfil the eligibility criteria before applying for admission.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee Submission

The college releases the merit list based on the last qualifying exam scores of candidates. After candidates get shortlisted in the selection round, they are required to pay PSGR Krishnammal College For Women fee to get seats.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Well-advanced labs and classrooms are there. Our campus has hi-speed Wi-Fi. It has well-maintained libraries. Facilities in the hostel are good with homely food and good in taste. It also provides importance for sports and games. Good medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Accredited with the highest A+ grade, these are no small achievements.
reviews.review_text: Here, we have good infrastructure and environment with 24-hour free Wi-Fi and safe, secure surroundings, along with digital classes, laboratories, and libraries. There is good, hygienic food and water with snacks. We have friendly faculty and non-staff members to take care of the good environment.

reviews.review_heading: My college is ranked 4th in India.
reviews.review_text: Hygienic food and shelter, good water facilities, Wi-Fi access 24/7, walking area, food courts, medical facility, and healthy and friendly accommodation are provided. Every month, there is a healthy food day. Every year, there is a Hosteller's Day with a buffet dinner. The environment is conducive to pursuing learning objectives.

reviews.review_heading: PSGR Krishnammal College For Women in Tamilnadu Admission Process.
reviews.review_text: This college uses many infrastructure products and high-quality materials. It provides fast Wi-Fi, neat and clean classrooms, a very big garden, and bookshelves in the library, etc. The college committee organizes sports and games facilities and provides canteen facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2019, and nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. They provide free Wi-Fi for all the students. Thy have library, and advanced classrooms. They have a great seminar hall. The hostel is a little bit far from the college. They provide cab services. Food provided is not good. They have clubs and all the entertaining activities for students.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really amazing, and all the facilities are provided by the college. The quality of food is hygienic. The sports practices are good, especially that of NCC. The canteen and the mess are also providing good food and are affordable for students.

reviews.review_heading: Navigating My College Journey
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure includes good Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a library, along with job-oriented courses for our self-development. There is good maintenance in the hostel, mess, and canteen. More sports and gym facilities are available for all students, and my college encourages more women entrepreneurs.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely perfect.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with classrooms equipped with four fans and adequate lighting; generators are available in case of power outages. WiFi is available throughout the campus. Classrooms are well-maintained and cleaned daily. The library is well-maintained, with fiction, non-fiction, textbooks, and technical skill books. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: An evergreen campus life for you.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are enormous and can handle 70 members per class at a time. It is included with Wi-Fi and smart classrooms. We have one of the best libraries in Coimbatore, which has about 2000 books in different genres. Labs are authentically made in a stylish way with all technical supports.

reviews.review_heading: Krishnammal life is heaven.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is so good. The college campus is so neat. The classrooms are so wide. There are 4 to 5 fans in the room. The restrooms at the college are so neat and hygienic. I stay in the college hostel. The food is tasty and clean. The college has a canteen with a wide variety of food items.

faqs.answer: A:    CDLU follows a seat reservation policy as per the guidelines of Haryana government. The reservation policy is as follows:15% of the seats shall be open/unreserved and will be filled through All India Quota (AIQ) (including Haryana). Out of the 15%  AIQ seats,  10% will be reserved for Economically Weaker Section (EWS)Remaining 85% seats are reserved for bona fide residents of Haryana (State Quota) and will be filled up asdetailed below:i) Haryana Open General Open Category (HOGC) - 40% of the State Quotaii) Reserved category of Haryana - 60% of the State Quotaiii) Scheduled Caste (SC) - 20% of State quotaiv) Backward Classes of Haryana (A) (BCA) - 16% of State quotav) Backward Classes of Haryana (B) (BCB) - 11% of State quotavi) Economically Weaker Section (EWS) - 10% of State quotavii) Differently Abled Persons / Divyang - 3% of State quota
faqs.question: Is there any seat reservation policy followed at CDLU?

faqs.answer: A:    Chaudhary Devi Lal University (CDLU) offers MBA programs through three entrance exams: CAT (Common Admission Test), CMAT (Common Management Aptitude Test), UET (University Entrance Test), and GMAT (Graduate Management Admission Test). The CAT is the most widely accepted entrance exam for MBA programs in India, with minimum cut-offs varying depending on the programme and specialization. CMAT is another national-level MBA entrance exam accepted by several universities, with minimum cut-offs varying for specific programs. CDLU conducts its own UET for certain MBA programs and specializations, with minimum UET score cut-offs determined by CDLU for each programme and specialization. GMAT scores may be considered alongside other entrance exam scores or during the selection process. Other factors like academic merit and work experience can also influence the selection process. For detailed information on acceptable entrance exams, minimum score cut-offs, and admission criteria, visit the CDLU website's Admission page or individual programme brochures. It is important to consult the latest official information from CDLU to stay updated on the admission process for your desired program.

faqs.answer: A:    In case a candidate decides to withdraw his/her admission in a particular programme offered at CDLU, the following fee refund conditions will apply: (i) If a candidate leaves any programme, the entire fee deposited by the candidate will be refunded upto September 30 after deducting processing fee of INR 1000 (ii) If the admission of a student is cancelled by the college, for no fault of his/her, the duespaid by him/her will be refunded (iii) Caution money/Security Deposit is refundable if application is received by December 31 of the year of the completion of course.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of University College, Sirsa.

review_content.Placements: I was a student at one of the colleges in CDLU, Sirsa. It is a government college. There was a separate placement cell that organized placement from time to time. There are no companies in the city where I live but there are private banks that provide opportunities to students. The placement rate is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Unlike other government colleges, which often lack proper labs or computers, this college offers a good environment for students, including a computer lab with air conditioning and a spoken English lab where you can earn a free certificate. I was not a hostel student, but a friend of mine lived there. According to her, the hostel felt like a home, with well-maintained rooms, hygienic food, and extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.title: Honest review for engineering.

content.Placements: The course has just started so the 1st ever batch of the degree will graduate this year. Some students got placed in the 4th year only (off-campus mostly). There are minimal efforts from the university side, so students need to grind on their own for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The computers are there but no furniture. On paper there should be 3 labs in the department. But there is no proper computer lab in the department which is ironic because literally bachelors in computer science. The classes are okay, and other infrastructure is there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Sirsa.

content.Placements: 69% of students got placed. The highest package was 12 LPA, while the lowest was 3.6 LPA. Top banking institutions, leading industrial companies, and government organizations recruited students from the college. Around 37% of students from my course secured internships at HDFC Bank and Axis Bank. My personal goal was to become an IAS officer.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities were available in my college. The library was very good, and the classrooms were very clean. No kind of garbage was found inside the college. There were large grounds for sports, science labs, and special rooms for resting. Wi-Fi was available throughout the college.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Chaudhary Devi Lal University?
faqs.answer: Yes, MBA course is available at Chaudhary Devi Lal University. CDLU offers a two-year MBA course at the PG level. To be eligible for the award of the degree, candidates shall complete the course in a maximum period of two years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass graduation (common eligibility) to apply for the MBA course.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does CDLU - Chaudhary Devi Lal University accept for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: Chaudhary Devi Lal University (CDLU) offers MBA programs through three entrance exams: CAT (Common Admission Test), CMAT (Common Management Aptitude Test), UET (University Entrance Test), and GMAT (Graduate Management Admission Test). The CAT is the most widely accepted entrance exam for MBA programs in India, with minimum cut-offs varying depending on the programme and specialization. CMAT is another national-level MBA entrance exam accepted by several universities, with minimum cut-offs varyin

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to MBA at CDLU - Chaudhary Devi Lal University?
faqs.answer: Any applicant who has passed a bachelor’s degree in any discipline with at least 50% marks is eligible to apply for admission to the CDLU MBA course.(General) The Candidate seeking admission must be graduate with 50% marks (47.5% marks for SC/ST candidatesChaudhary Devi Lal University (CDLU) offers MBA programs through three entrance exams: CAT (Common Admission Test), CMAT (Common Management Aptitude Test), UET (University Entrance Test), and GMAT (Graduate Management Admission Test)All the bes

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for various course at Chaudhary Devi Lal University?
faqs.answer: CDLU course admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. Candidates must visit theCDLU admission portalto apply for the respective courses. faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

placement_data.title: CDLU Placements Overview 2024
paragraphs: CDLU placement data for 2024 or 2023 has not been released. However, the NIRF report 2022 is out. As per the report, 3 UG (3-year) and 2 PG (2-year) students were placed during 2021 CDLU placements. The median package offered to UG (3-year) and PG (2-year) students during Chaudhary Devi Lal University placements 2021 was INR 1.20 LPA and INR 3.24 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Chaudhary Devi Lal University?
faqs.answer: The official placement report or brochure is not out yet. However, the University has released the NIRF report 2022 which includes the 2021 placement statistics for various UG and PG courses. Out of 88 UG (3-year) students, 3 were placed during 2021 placements. For PG (2-year) courses, 2 out of 718 students were placed. faqs.question: How are the placements for B.Sc course at CDLU?
faqs.answer: The lastest CDLU placement report not available yet. Based on the NIRF Report 2022, the average package offered during UG (3-year) placements of the university was INR 1.2 LPA. As per the student reviews on CDLU available on Shiksha.com, the top recruiting companies for BSc placements at CDLU are Tata, Reliance, Jio, and Jindal. The overall rating given to CDLU placements is 2.8/5. For most BSc specialisations, the placement opportunities were very limited and students had to search for the jobs on their own.

faqs.question: How costly is CDLU - Chaudhary Devi Lal University?
faqs.answer: According to, students can choose from 21 specialized, career-oriented courses offered by CDLU. The university also offers distance learning courses that are focused on careers. The price of a degree at Sirsa, Haryana's Chaudhary Devi Lal University (CDLU) varies according to the particular programme and course. All courses at CDLU have annual fees ranging from Rs 13,000 to Rs 17,000. The cost information for particular programs, like the M.Sc. (Computer Science) programme, is also given; it ranges from Rs 3,000 to Rs 12,000 annually.The annual tuition for CDLU's B.Ed program is INR 2,400. The first year's CDLU fees for the MBA program are INR 22,400, and the second year's fees are INR 22,100. For two years, the MA CDLU fees are INR 11,500.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B Tech at CDLU - Chaudhary Devi Lal University?
faqs.answer: Chaudhary Devi Lal University (CDLU), Haryana is NAAC accredited government university. It offers many courses to the candidates who want to take admission in CDLU. The annual tuition fees for the B.Tech course is INR 160000. The fees for the B.Tech course is quite affordable as compared to the B.Tech courses of other colleges. The eligibility criteria for the students who want to join the B.Tech course is that they must have scored more than 45% marks in their 12th board examination or any other equivalent 10+2 examination from any recognised education board of India. They admit students on the basis of their performance in the JEE Mains and HSTES entrance examination.

cut_off.college_name: CDLU Cutoff 2025: Check JEE Main Round Wise Ranks

faqs: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
description: CDLU cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at CDLU can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

CDLU cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff was 454620 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 375810.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 454620.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

During the last round, CDLU B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 was 454620 for students in the General AI quota. According to this cutoff list, B.Tech. in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) proved to be the toughest to get a seat in 2025, while in 2024, the same specialisation had the cutoff rank of 265104, and in 2023, it was 323928. This pattern clearly suggests that the competition for this specialisation has saw fluctuation over the past three years.

hostel_campus.college_name: CDLU Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: University has five hostels three for girls and two for boys with facilities like electric geysers, water coolers with RO system, Plasma TVs along with Dish/DTH and many more. The hostels also subscribe to several national and regional dailies and magazines for enabling the students to know what is happening around the world.

library.description: Chaudhary Devi Lal University has a fully computerized library with a huge collection of 65163 books,18 magazines, 15 newspapers, 110 Indian journals and foreign journals to cater to the needs of the students and faculty. The library also provides reference books including encyclopedia, dictionary and many more. Book Bank facility of 2269 for SC/ ST students is also available in the library. Also, have a collection of 629 Theses and Dissertation. The facility of E-books and E-journals through INFLIBNET and DELNET is also provided to the users.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The computers are there but no furniture. On paper there should be 3 labs in the department. But there is no proper computer lab in the department which is ironic because literally bachelors in computer science. The classes are okay, and other infrastructure is there.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Sirsa.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities were available in my college. The library was very good, and the classrooms were very clean. No kind of garbage was found inside the college. There were large grounds for sports, science labs, and special rooms for resting. Wi-Fi was available throughout the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by University College, SirsaReviewed on 30 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of University College, Sirsa.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Unlike other government colleges, which often lack proper labs or computers, this college offers a good environment for students, including a computer lab with air conditioning and a spoken English lab where you can earn a free certificate. I was not a hostel student, but a friend of mine lived there. According to her, the hostel felt like a home, with well-maintained rooms, hygienic food, and extracurricular activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by University College, SirsaReviewed on 20 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college offers good infrastructure but no placement support is available.
reviews.review_text: The college offers top-quality infrastructure, including well-maintained facilities such as Wi-Fi, computer laboratories, a canteen, and a library. These amenities are efficient and support students' academic needs effectively. The hostel facilities are also commendable, both in terms of infrastructure and the quality of food provided. Furthermore, the classrooms are well-equipped, with 4-5 ceiling fans installed in each room to ensure adequate ventilation and a comfortable learning environment....

In case a candidate decides to withdraw his/her admission in a particular programme offered at CDLU, the following fee refund conditions will apply: (i) If a candidate leaves any programme, the entire fee deposited by the candidate will be refunded upto September 30 after deducting processing fee of INR 1000
(ii) If the admission of a student is cancelled by the college, for no fault of his/her, the duespaid by him/her will be refunded
(iii) Caution money/Security Deposit is refundable if application is received by December 31 of the year of the completion of course.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding ICAT Design and Media College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: ICAT Design and Media College is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design and Mass Communication & Media. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Sc. and BVA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Sc. and PG Diploma. The fee structure for the ICAT Design and Media College programmes is around INR 1,60,000 to 6,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    A BSc in Animation offers a strong foundation for a career in the following areas:Animation: 2D & 3D animation, character design, storyboardingGaming: Game design, concept art,  3D modeling, game animationVFX (Visual Effects): VFX artist, compositor, motion graphics designerOther Creative Fields: Graphic design, concept art for film/TV, web design (depending on program)The job market is competitive, but with strong skills and a good portfolio, you'll find opportunities in studios, production houses, advertising agencies, and more.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Game Design and Development - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I'm having a really bad experience and I'm regretting joining this college.

review_content.Placements: Our senior didn't get any placement opportunity, despite our college claiming to give 100% placement. However, their terms say that we need to have an average of above 75% score in exams, but no one scores near 75%. They say that students should not fail in any subject, but they intentionally fail students at least once to avoid committing to job placements. If any student gets a job, the college pays them to say he/she got the job because of the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: College don't have their own hostel, they outsource hostels and it is really bad. As for the courses, they only teach what they choose, and then expect students to know everything. They have different courses but they teach the same stuff. The college takes money for almost everything, even for non-important facilities, and always finds a way to take as much money as possible from students.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Multimedia - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The teachers are helpful in nature.

review_content.Placements: The average package is around Rs 6,00,000 per year. The highest package is around Rs 12,00,000 per year. Companies like Adobe, Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Ubisoft, Electronic Arts, DreamWorks Animation, Pixar, etc. are coming for campus placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a computer lab with high-end computers and graphic workstations. There is a well-stocked library with a wide range of books, magazines, and journals on multimedia and related topics. The classrooms are well-equipped with air conditioning and audiovisual equipment.

answer.text: A career in media industry requires commitment, dedication and sacrifice of personal time for the sake of staying on front or top, particularly in news industry. A journalist may have to work day in and day out to get breaking news. Similarly, media professionals who are in entertainment or film making need to work with passion which may come at the cost of their personal life. However, in a nutshell, Bachelor of Journalism and Mass Communication degree is enough for a person to fetch a job of any interest in the media field.Few of the areas s/he can choose from, include:TV channelsCirculation and Public RelationsCentral Information ServiceLegal Affairs DepartmentJournalsAIR - All India RadioNews AgenciesPress Information BureauAdvertising agenciesBroadcasting companies.Hopefully, the above information will help you make an informed decision.

overview_faqs.answer: ICAT Design and Media College is a well-known institution for BVA, B.Sc, M.Sc, PG Diploma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, ICAT Design and Media College has a rating of 3.42 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.49 on Campus Life, 3.28 on Placements, 3.57 on Faculty and 3.39 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Can you elaborate on the BSc Design career?
overview_faqs.answer: Sure, the BSc Design career scope is vast, with diverse career paths based on the specialisation you choose to study. It will offer you not just the theoretical knowledge but also help you gain creative and technical skills. You can even go for freelance opportunities once you gain relevant skills and experience in the industry.

review_summary.college_name: ICAT Design and Media College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Visual Effects - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Industry-focused VFX course.

content.Placements: In the 2022–25 VFX batch, 85% of students are placed. The highest package is 9 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and the average is 5 LPA. The top recruiters include MPC, DNEG, and Technicolor. Around 90% of students get internships at studios like Framestore and Red Chillies. Offered roles include Compositing Artist and FX Artist. Many students from the 2021–24 VFX batch also get freelance opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The VFX department has modern labs, high-end systems, Wi-Fi, green screens, and access to a media library. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. Hostels are clean, with Wi-Fi and good security. The mess food is not very good but is okay. The medical aid, sports ground, and indoor games are well maintained.

individual_reviews.course: BVA in Graphic and Communication Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty and their behaviour.

content.Placements: 1 out of 10 students get off-campus placements. The highest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Only 10% of students got internships. Roles offered in my course are graphic designer, game designer, user interface, and user experience.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is given but the speed is only 2 Kb/s. Facilities are okay only. Labs are good. Classrooms have air conditioners but only as a show piece. The library is good but books are not updated in the last decade. The canteen is there but the food is only a bit edible.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Game Design and Development - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I'm having a really bad experience and I'm regretting joining this college.

content.Placements: Our senior didn't get any placement opportunity, despite our college claiming to give 100% placement. However, their terms say that we need to have an average of above 75% score in exams, but no one scores near 75%. They say that students should not fail in any subject, but they intentionally fail students at least once to avoid committing to job placements. If any student gets a job, the college pays them to say he/she got the job because of the college.
content.Infrastructure: College don't have their own hostel, they outsource hostels and it is really bad. As for the courses, they only teach what they choose, and then expect students to know everything. They have different courses but they teach the same stuff. The college takes money for almost everything, even for non-important facilities, and always finds a way to take as much money as possible from students.

content.Infrastructure: There is a computer lab with high-end computers and graphic workstations. There is a well-stocked library with a wide range of books, magazines, and journals on multimedia and related topics. The classrooms are well-equipped with air conditioning and audiovisual equipment.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is given but the speed is only 2 Kb/s. Facilities are okay only. Labs are good. Classrooms have air conditioners but only as a show piece. The library is good but books are not updated in the last decade. The canteen is there but the food is only a bit edible.

reviews.review_heading: I'm having a really bad experience and I'm regretting joining this college.
reviews.review_text: College don't have their own hostel, they outsource hostels and it is really bad. As for the courses, they only teach what they choose, and then expect students to know everything. They have different courses but they teach the same stuff. The college takes money for almost everything, even for non-important facilities, and always finds a way to take as much money as possible from students.

reviews.review_heading: The teachers are helpful in nature.
reviews.review_text: There is a computer lab with high-end computers and graphic workstations. There is a well-stocked library with a wide range of books, magazines, and journals on multimedia and related topics. The classrooms are well-equipped with air conditioning and audiovisual equipment.

reviews.review_heading: The teachers are helpful in nature.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-stocked library with a wide range of books, magazines, and journals on multimedia and related topics. There is a well-equipped classroom with air conditioning and audiovisual equipment. There is a Wi-Fi facility available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is pretty nice if you belong to a rich family.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi and classrooms are spacious. The college provides Wi-Fi for laptops so we need to share some information of the laptop so that we can connect to the Wi-Fi. The college doesn't have hostel facility but they do provide PGs for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: Our college is well maintained and air-conditioned. There is a parking and a lively canteen that serves healthy food. It has a well-maintained auditorium, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a good library. Our campus provides a game lounge for students to enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a creative space.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is well-maintained. All facilities are available. The library is very good. Canteen is available. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are air-conditioned. The parking area is also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Air-conditioners are available in classrooms. A projector is available in every room. A library is available. Many books are available in the library. The hostel facilities are good. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. They served three times food. A washing machine is available. The hostel rooms are good and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good environment for studying.
reviews.review_text: Our college was Wi-Fi enabled. A library, a mess, and labs were available in our college. Our college had not provided a hostel facility. The food served in the mess was good.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for Visual Effects, good placements, average or below average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. The hallway to your classes are very small compared to other colleges and can get crowded during big events. Classrooms are very good, all rooms have A/C. Few classrooms also have Macs. You have Wi-Fi for each class/department. The canteen is on the topmost floor or terrace, you can get all the basic eatables there. The library is also good you can get all books related to your course there. There's a ground in front of the college where you can play...

reviews.review_heading: This college is a waste of your money and time.
reviews.review_text: Its a one structure college. They will say they have a hostel but don't go on their words. They will just say that to earn more money from you. They just have a PG which is very high rented than other PGs around there. Food is the worse and not much facilities as well.

reviews.review_heading: The number 1 college in India with good faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not much huge, but the building is good and sufficient for students. They provide every equipment required. There is a playground where we play cricket and football. The interior is awesome.

reviews.review_heading: ICAT is a good college to learn digital media like VFX and animation.
reviews.review_text: ICAT has a good infrastructure. In Bangalore, it is situated in hour main road, near BTM layout and Madivala. ICAT has Wi-Fi with high-speed and classroom are fully air-conditioned. We have a big library with various books and digital media. We have a VFX green screen room in our college.

reviews.review_heading: My review about icat college.
reviews.review_text: In this generation Wi-Fi is kind of friend in need is a friend indeed kind of thing. In this case college Wi-Fi ***. Classroom is smart classroom well built and lots of inspiration in the wall which our seniors and classmates created. Library is good where there was lot of knowledge related to your specialisation. All events and fest are quite nice to participate. Eventhough you can participate and show your talents.

admission_process.title: Ellen College of Design Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Ellen College of Design admissionsare completely merit-based. The college conducts direct admission to its courses.Ellen College of Designoffers programmes at UG, PG and diploma levels in the Design stream. Candidates can apply online or offline for any of the Ellen, Jaipur courses.
Find below the key highlights for Ellen Jaipur admissions 2025:
Particulars
Ellen Jaipur Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status
Ongoing:UG, PG & Diploma courses
How to apply?
https://www.ellenschool.com/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

The selection criteria for UG and PG courses are based on the past academic merit of their last qualifying exam. For diploma courses also, merit is considered for providing admission. Check below course-wise eligibility and selection criteria:
Ellen College of Design admissions are merit-based. Aspirants must check the desired course eligibility criteria to apply. Below are the steps to get admission to Ellen College of Design:
Step 1: Ellen College of Design Application Process 2025

Aspirants meeting eligibility criteria can apply online or offline for a course. Candidates can collect the form offline from the admission office of the campus or may apply online on the official website.
Step 2: Selection Process
Admission to the B.Des course is based on direct admission for all the courses. The college considers merit in the last qualifying exam for the respective courses.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

Shortlisted candidates have to report with the specified documents for verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college. Below are the documents required for admission:
For more information about Ellen College of Design Admission Process check out the below video:

paragraphs: Ellen College of Design provides internship and placement training to its students. The training modules are designed to provide students rich industry experience and make them job-ready . The College gives 100% focus on practical and experiential learning in order to prepare students for professional challenges.

The College also conducts Industrial Trainings / Seminars wherein students get the opportunity to work on Live projects and gain valuable industry insights. Companies such as Lifestyle, Pantaloons and Future Group have visited the campus in recent past during Ellen College of Design placements.

faqs.question: Does Ellen College of Design have good placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, Ellen College of Design has a dedicated placement cell that facilitates all types of placement and internship related activities. The College strongly focuses on practical and experiential learning of students. This is the reason, Ellen College of Design conducts Industrial training sessions and seminars for students.

faqs.question: Does Ellen College of Design conduct placement trainings?

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, decent campus life, and helpful teachers.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure for academics with Wi-Fi, clean classrooms, and well-equipped labs. The library is decent and has most of the required books. Although the college doesn't have a hostel, there are many PGs nearby with average facilities. The campus has a canteen, basic medical facilities, and some sports options.

reviews.review_heading: I am glad to take admission in Ellen School of Art and Design. I learned so many things from here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Ellen School of Art and Design is extremely good. There are well furnished with AC enabled labs and classrooms. The machines which are used in labs are of good quality. Wi-Fi facility is also there. Computer classrooms are also there for those who want to work on a computer.

reviews.review_heading: Most satisfying college in terms of study and placements with affordable fees.
reviews.review_text: While talking about infrastructure, Ellen school of art and design is very attractive, the classrooms are so clean and cool, we have a library and a huge garden with a lot of trees and greenery. Fully air conditioned campus and a lot of facilities for students.

highlights.summary: Army Institute of Fashion and Design, Bengaluru admissions 2025-26 are open for all the courses. The last date to apply is Mar 31, 2025, tentatively. Further, with a late fee, the last application date is Apr 15, 2025, tentatively. Interested candidates can apply for the desired course through the official website of the institute.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Army Institute of Fashion and Design provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Design, and have a fee structure of around INR 43,560 to 6,11,712. UG programs include B.Sc. Further, the PG programs include M.Sc.

review_content.Placements: Hii, I'm Priya from AIFD Bangalore Karnataka. My batch is 2023 to 2026. As a student I can assure you that AIFD provides 100 percent placements after the completion of the course. Top companies such as Zara, Raymond, Rare rabbit, Best seller come to provide placements. The average package is above 6 Lacs. Jobs given by the companies are virtual merchandising, stylist, retail etc. College has awesome facilities and faculty who will support you throughout your course and provide friendly environment. AIFD has free Wi-Fi in college and hostel and have 40 computers, 2 stitching lab, photography studio etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion and Apparel Design - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: AIFD is a good college for pursuing Fashion and Design .

review_content.Placements: AIFD provides decent placement opportunities for all the final year students, the institute has a 100% placement history. The salary package is also fairly good, AIFD is ranked 13th all over India for placements. The top recruiting companies of AIFD are Puma, Nike, Homecentre, Arvind, H&M, Uniqlo. These companies come to the campus each year to recruit students. All the students get internships and all of them get placed however placements mostly happen in Visual Merchandising and Retail sector due to the demand.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus strength is fairly less compared to all the other colleges therefore the infrastructure of the college is also relatively small however all the facilities such as lab, library, visual merchandising labs are provided by the institute. The infrastructure of the hostel is excellent, the washrooms and cloth drying areas are very clean. The quality of food keeps varying but it is satisfactory.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion and Apparel Design - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: The college follows good academic culture and strict discipline, but they are student friendly.

review_content.Placements: There is a placement cell which provides the placement to each student of the batch according to their academic performance and their personality. When I went to my final year, the companies like Adidas, Nike, Puma, Zara, and retail companies like Apple and BlackBerry visit the college for placements. The highest salary package offered was 5.4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is known for its innovative ideas of art in the study area. The college has the reputed facilitates like the lawn of art, which is situated just in front of the study area. The entire campus is enabled with Wi-Fi campus, and the college has two computer labs having 45-50 computers in each. The academic building has seven air-conditioned classrooms, two stitching labs, a reception room, two visual merchandising mock room, and one advanced fabrication and an analysis lab. Apart from the academic building, the campus has two football ground, one basketball court, and three badminton court.

review_summary.college_name: Army Institute of Fashion and Design Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion and Apparel Design - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Zero peer-to-peer catering despite having such a small pool of students.

content.Placements: There were literally 10% of placements offered to the whole batch, despite the college's USP of 100% placement when we applied. Our seniors got 100% placed, but currently, there is a serious demand for designing roles, while options like FC and other retail roles seem to be dead-end options in this era. The internship experience was pretty good.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are meant to be well-equipped, yet there are serious issues regarding the functionality of the software, and the computers are often too outdated to run new versions. The hostel food is something I would personally not recommend to anyone, as it is not prepared in hygienic conditions in the boys' hostel. One serious issue is that when there are problems, they refer you to HM College, saying the boys' hostel comes under their jurisdiction. However, when fines are imposed for hostel issues, they don't communicate with the management of the same college, and this only applies to the boys' hostel.

Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. placement_data.title: Army Institute of Fashion and Design Placement overview
paragraphs: Army Institute of Fashion and Design (AIFD) facilitates placement opportunities to its students with the help of its Institute Advisory Committee. The committe comprises eminent personalities from the Fashion and Apparel Industry. AIFD has an excellent record of 100% placements. The highest CTC offered was Rs 4 LPA and Rs 2.8 LPA was the average CTC offered during AIFD placement drive. Some of the top job profiles offered to the students include Production Coordinator, VM Executive, Retail Stylist, Fashion Consultant, Content Writer, etc.
Some of the highlights of AIFD placements, collated from several sources on the internet, are as follows

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham ranks #8 under the category 'University'.

Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham admissions 2026 are open to all the courses. Interested students can visit the official website and apply now. A few more updates are as forllows:

table.details: - Ranked in the band 1001-1200 by the QS World University Rankings 2026 - Ranked 8th under the 'Universities' category by the NIRF Ranking 2025 - Ranked 9th under the 'Medical' category by the NIRF Ranking 2025

college_info.intro: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Coimbatore offers undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and certificate programmes across various streams such as Agriculture, Architecture, Engineering, Medicine, Management, Mass Communication, and others. BSc, BTech and MBA are the flagship programmes offered at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Coimbatore. The institute offers BTech programme for the duration of 4 years. review_summary.college_name: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Coimbatore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS ) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: I have a good experience, so students can join it.

content.Placements: As of now, I cannot talk about placements as the senior-most batch is in the 3rd year of MBBS, although they have many clinical postings. They're even posted to CHC Kheri Kalan and all in nearby villages like Badshahpur, and OPDs are not crowded as of now.
content.Infrastructure: It has a very nice and well-maintained infrastructure. Hostels have attached washrooms, and 2 students stay in a room. 1st year students' hostels are different from seniors'. The mess food is pathetic, bad, and overpriced. They even wrap up the food before the time. All facilities are good. Labs are well-equipped.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Where learning meets passion.

content.Placements: 95% of students are placed, Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Fidelity, IBM, Top roles offered are Software Engineer, Software Developed, The highest was 48LPA, the lowest is 3LPA, average is 15LPA, 60% got internship and the companies are Fidelity, Scale.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available are Wi-Fi, labs, a water dispenser, library, study room. The quality of the rooms in the hostel is somewhere between average and high quality and some food is very delicious, while some is average. They also provide a cafeteria they have doctors available 24/7.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BCA + MCA - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Average college life with decent academics.

content.Placements: Course is MCA and BCA, and the duration is 5 years. Passing out is 2030. Approximately 60-70 percent of students got placed from the course. The recruiting companies are TCS, HCL, IBM, etc. Around 40 - 50 percent of students got internships. Top roles offered are software developer, junior Java developer, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-maintained classrooms with proper seating arrangements, projects, and a good learning environment. The campus is equipped with Wi-Fi connectivity, computer labs, and a library. The hostel facilities include clean rooms, regular water supply, and electricity. The quality of food in the mess is average, with only vegetarian options available. Medical facilities are available on campus or nearby. The college also provides facilities for sports and games, including indoor games and outdoor sports areas.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. Robotics and Artificial Intelligence (RAI) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure and faculty are good.

content.Placements: I will complete my B.Tech in 2029. Coming to jobs basically depends on us, somewhat top in Amrita to be top, so we must work hard for placement. Life is very hard, we have to fight until we succeed. Coming to my course is basically to gain more knowledge than packages.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel food is average even the canteen food is average. There is a rule that only cash system is in college canteen. College is good but coming to food I am really very unhappy. We have to struggle for 4 years, but other facilities are really good apart from food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Academic excellence and facilities, mediocre placements, and hardcore campus life.

content.Placements: At CSE in Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Amritapuri, the placements are mediocre. Approximately 60-65 percent of the students are placed, primarily by mass recruiters. The highest package is approximately 18 LPA-20 LPA ( very few students ), the average package is 5 LPA-6 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA-3.6 LPA. TCS, Infosys, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini, Wipro, and HCL are major recruiting firms. Approximately 35-40 percent of students receive internships, mostly off-campus. Functional types of jobs provided include Software Engineer, System Engineer, Data Analytics, and QA, with few competitive but product company roles.

faqs.question: How to take admission in a BTech course at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeeth?
faqs.answer: Admission to Amrita University BTech courses is throughJEE MainandAmrita Entrance Examination Engineering(AEEE). Candidates with a valid score in either of the examination can apply. To declare the names of selected candidates, the university will release a merit list containing the names of the students that fulfill both the selection and eligibility criteria for the BTech admissions.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham?
faqs.answer: The total course fee is inclusive of multiple components, including tuition fee, enrolment fee, security deposit, etc. Amrita University BTech fee range between INR 10 Lacs and INR 18 Lacs (Non-Scholarship category). Candidates are advised to visit the university official website or get in touch with the admission office for information on the fee structure.

faqs.question: How can I get MBA admission in Amrita University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria can fill out the Amrita University MBA application form online. Admission to the MBA programmes is based on merit inCAT/AMET/GMAT/GRE/AMET. Candidates shortlisted based on exam scores are further called for a personal interview round. Based on the candidate's overall performance in the selection rounds, seat allotment is carried out.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for Amrita University?
faqs.answer: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham admission process involves online registration, form filling, entrance test, release of merit list, and seat allotment. Admission to some of the courses is entrance-based while for others, the university considers merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates who meet the respective course-specific eligibility criteria can fill out the online application form. Check below a few of the Amrita University courses along with their accepted exams:Course NameAccepted ExamsBSc/ MScAEEE, JEE Main, IISER Entrance ExamBTechJEE Main, AEEE, SAT IndiaMA/ BACAP TestMTechGATE, TANCETMBAMAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, KMAT, AMETMD/ MSNEET PG, AIAPGETBAMS/ MBBS/ BDSNEET

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission for BSc at Amrita University?
faqs.answer: According to the official website, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham does not offer direct admission for its BSc programme. Candidates must meet their course-specific eligibility criteria to be considered. The university will finalise the list of selected candidates based on their performance in the selection round. The sanctioned seats are allocated to eligible candidates who fulfil all the requisite criteria. Additionally, the selection criteria vary depending on the chosen specialisation.

faqs.question: How many students can be admitted to the BSc programme at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham?
faqs.answer: The total seat intake for the BSc programme at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham is260 seats. There is a proper system of admission, and the admitted students are evaluated based on their Class 12 aggregate and the scores obtained in the accepted entrance exam. This figure is indicative and may be subject to modification. The university allocates seats across its affiliated colleges, ensuring that the distribution aligns with capacity and academic standards. To confirm the seats, shortlisted candidates must pay the applicable fee.

highlights.description:
One of India’s leading institutes is Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national & international ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #17 under Overall category, #8 under University, #23 under Engineering, #26 under Management, and #14 under Pharmacy. Internationally, QS World 2025 has also ranked the institute #1001-1200. Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham rankings is covered in the following article:

nirf.description:
Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham climbed 1 rank to #17 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham fell 1 rank to #8 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'Management' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham climbed 2 ranks to #26 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
In the 'Medical' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham fell 1 rank to #9 rank in the 'Medical' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham's rank is #1001, the same as last year's rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham fell 15 ranks to #307 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham fell 1 rank to #72 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

hostel.description: Amrita University provides separate hostel facility for boys and girls that accommodate above 3500 inmates. All the hostels have basic amenities like water purifiers, common room, recreation room, mess, TV, laundry services, security and surveillance system etc.

library.description: Amrita University’s central library is stocked with over 58103 books, 377 periodicals, 3000+ online e-resources like e-journals, e-books, conference proceedings, e-databases and standards, 2650 project reports, 7086 back-volumes and 4781 CD/DVDs resources. Centrally air-conditioned library subscribe to the online e-resources/e-databases such as ACM, ASCE, ASME, ASTM, Access Engineering from McGraw-Hill, J-Gate (JET) & (SMS), IEEE Xplore (ASPP).

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad CampusReviewed on 11 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I have a good experience, so students can join it.
reviews.review_text: It has a very nice and well-maintained infrastructure. Hostels have attached washrooms, and 2 students stay in a room. 1st year students' hostels are different from seniors'. The mess food is pathetic, bad, and overpriced. They even wrap up the food before the time. All facilities are good. Labs are well-equipped.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, CoimbatoreReviewed on 8 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Where learning meets passion.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available are Wi-Fi, labs, a water dispenser, library, study room. The quality of the rooms in the hostel is somewhere between average and high quality and some food is very delicious, while some is average. They also provide a cafeteria they have doctors available 24/7.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Amrita School of Arts and Sciences, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Mysuru CampusReviewed on 3 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Average college life with decent academics.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-maintained classrooms with proper seating arrangements, projects, and a good learning environment. The campus is equipped with Wi-Fi connectivity, computer labs, and a library. The hostel facilities include clean rooms, regular water supply, and electricity. The quality of food in the mess is average, with only vegetarian options available. Medical facilities are available on campus or nearby. The college also provides facilities for sports and games, including indoor gam...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Bengaluru CampusReviewed on 22 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and faculty are good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is average even the canteen food is average. There is a rule that only cash system is in college canteen. College is good but coming to food I am really very unhappy. We have to struggle for 4 years, but other facilities are really good apart from food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Amritapuri CampusReviewed on 21 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Academic excellence and facilities, mediocre placements, and hardcore campus life.
reviews.review_text: The campus facilities are excellent and include adequately equipped CSE laboratories, strong internet access on Wi-Fi, neat classes, and a central library with a lot of stock. Facilities of the hostel are very strict yet good, with clean rooms and heavy security. Mess food is mediocre and monotonous, and there are medical and bare-bones sports amenities on campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Amritapuri CampusReviewed on 20 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is good and infrastructure is getting changed every year for the better. No faculty are good .
reviews.review_text: They will provide Wi-Fi in hostel and college food is okay but not really good. They will encourage sports students. Medical facilities are there but not good quality of food is not good but the taste is okay. Library is okay, not as good looking as other colleges.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Amritapuri CampusReviewed on 20 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a university that believes in education for life and education for living.
reviews.review_text: In terms of facilities, it's good. There is no AC in any classroom. We can only have AC in labs, so it is better not to keep such thoughts. Hostels are good, and they are cool as the climate is mostly humid and cool here. The best quality of food is served. If students are from the state of Andhra Pradesh or Telangana, then it is hard for them to adapt to it. Medical facilities are extraordinarily good, as we can find a hospital on our own campus with all the equipment. Sports facilities are goo...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Amritapuri CampusReviewed on 12 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good teachers, good placements, and a good library.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good Wi-Fi, labs, and a library. The hostel food is a bit bad because it's vegetarian. Medical facilities, sports, and games are good. Food available in the canteen is Idli, Dosa, Pasta, Sambaar, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Bengaluru CampusReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college with decent placements and supportive faculty
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good and useful for daily study. Classrooms are clean, labs have the required computers, and Wi-Fi works most of the time. The library is peaceful for self-study. Hostel rooms are okay. The food is average but manageable. Medical and sports facilities are available for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Bengaluru CampusReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Detailed and unfiltered review of Amrita University, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are very good at Amrita University Bangalore. Rooms are large enough for four students, which does not make it difficult because rooms have enough space. The campus is located in Bangalore, so it is not as large as it is seen in movies.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Amritapuri CampusReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but still needs improvements. The hostel is fine, but sometimes the mess food is a big headache because when some local students go home during holidays, the mess food is the worst at night. However, during breakfast and lunch, it’s good for the amount they charge per year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, CoimbatoreReviewed on 4 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of M.Tech in Biomedical Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The innovative laboratories with all the special healthcare set up are built with all such necessary biomedical devices. Students never tense about anything on campus, because there are some primary responsibilities in all the zones. Everything was followed by us under certain rules of management.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, CoimbatoreReviewed on 2 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Coimbatore.
reviews.review_text: The laboratories were equipped with various testing equipment, CNC machines, and other tools.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Amrita School of Arts and Sciences, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Mysuru CampusReviewed on 2 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, but a bad hostel.
reviews.review_text: The classroom and university are beautiful, including Wi-Fi speakers, libraries, PC lab, etc., for my BBA and B.A. courses. The hostel is not good. The food is bad, the rooms are small, and you're forced to share them with 4 people. The food may consist of insects and rocks. Canteen is good tho, the quality and quantity are really good, the price too is low.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, CoimbatoreReviewed on 30 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeeth review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facility, modern classroom, and labs were well equipped with instruments and machinery. The quality of hostel was very good. Canteen and mess food was awesome in taste.

highlights.summary:
The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration last date for Garden City University Bangalore admission to the BE/BTech programme has been extended till Mar 20, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Garden City University comprises 9 schools of study, including Science, Social Studies, Health Science, Engineering, etc. The affiliated colleges and schools of the university offer a wide range of courses at the UG, PG, PhD, and Certificate programmes, across various streams. MBA, BTech, and BSc are some of the most popular programmes.
Garden City University Bangalore offers a full-time, 4-year BTech course at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Computer Science, Information Technology, Robotics, etc. The BSc programme offered by GCU Bangalore is a three-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Biotechnology, Forensic Science, Food Science and Technology, Data Science, Visual Communication, etc. Below mentioned are the Garden City University's popular programmes:

The institute accepts national entrance exams such as KCET, JEE Main, COMEDK, and others. Garden City University Bangalore course admission begins with an online application. Interested students must fill out the online application for the respective courses on the official website of the university.
