reviews_list.review_title: Quite a good place with a student-friendly atmosphere and quality of education.

review_content.Placements: Since my current batch has still not passed out, passing out batches have around 65 to 70% placement. Highest package is 6.5 LPA, and median package is around 4.5 LPA for UG courses. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Infosys, Cisco, and startups. Top roles are SDE1, Test engineer, Software developer, System / Data analyst, and IT Support.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus is equipped with good Wi-Fi facilities, and labs consist of necessary equipment for examinations. Classrooms are spacious, though I feel they could do with some added ventilation. Library has a large variety of books and computers on various topics and is peaceful for research and reading. Girls' and boys' hostels come in various sharing options. They are well-maintained, spacious, and have individual lockers and study tables for each student. Common washrooms and separate ones, and no issue with the plumbing and electricity.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Molecular and Human Genetics - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure and supportive faculty members which make it a great choice.

review_content.Placements: In our course, nearly 70-89% of students have secured placements in top fertility clinics, with many landing roles as laboratory technicians and embryologists at competitive entry-level salaries. As part of the curriculum, all students are guaranteed internships in their final semester, providing them with hands-on learning experiences alongside experienced embryologists and gynecologists.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus offers excellent Wi-Fi with spacious classrooms and a well-equipped library with access to books and journals. Sports include cricket, football, kabaddi, basketball with courts. Hostels are well-equipped with 24-hour hot water, Wi-Fi, medical facilities, spacious rooms, and hygienic restrooms. The canteen serves a hygienic variety of foods.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelors in Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is really great for extracurricular activities and facilities are also great.

review_content.Placements: The college is not really suitable for a course like physiotherapy but it is okay. We can join it for Bachelors. Placements for Physiotherapy are not that great but we can still join in for a bachelor's and join for some internships during college only for our own experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent. Facilities are all fine. The college campus is really clean and beautiful. The hostel facilities are really great like they provide good food which is decent. The hostel timings are fine. Wardens are really helpful and it is on the college campus.

review_summary.college_name: Garden City University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I'm really very satisfied with the college, the teachers are very good and friendly.

content.Placements: There are many roles that have been offered, like a senior engineer or cyber security analyst from any top company. Placement opportunities are also going on very well. Top companies are visiting the college and they are selecting students who are eligible.
content.Infrastructure: The courses and hostel offered by our college are really very good. We have high-speed Internet, Wi-Fi connection, the library is clean and there are many books we can find, and the classrooms are clean enough with smart technologies, ACs, and good infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Very satisfied and can be better at taking students out for exceptions or any events.

content.Placements: 70 to 80 percent get placed every year and a lot of opportunities from different companies through the various programs they conduct and for 2023 162 placed out of 463. TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Microsoft, Cisco, Dell, Axis Bank, HDFC Bank, ITC limited etc are the top major companies students get placed in.
content.Infrastructure: Good library. The university has Wi-Fi and smart classrooms with AC, but the issue is that students are not allowed to use the lifts. For example, if a classroom is on the 4th floor, students are required to use the stairs, which is very tiring and unfair. Sometimes there is a power cut, but it lasts only for a short time. Within a few minutes, the power is restored so that the smart board and fans are turned on again for both students and faculty.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Quite a good place with a student-friendly atmosphere and quality of education.

content.Placements: Since my current batch has still not passed out, passing out batches have around 65 to 70% placement. Highest package is 6.5 LPA, and median package is around 4.5 LPA for UG courses. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Infosys, Cisco, and startups. Top roles are SDE1, Test engineer, Software developer, System / Data analyst, and IT Support.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is equipped with good Wi-Fi facilities, and labs consist of necessary equipment for examinations. Classrooms are spacious, though I feel they could do with some added ventilation. Library has a large variety of books and computers on various topics and is peaceful for research and reading. Girls' and boys' hostels come in various sharing options. They are well-maintained, spacious, and have individual lockers and study tables for each student. Common washrooms and separate ones, and no issue with the plumbing and electricity.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Molecular and Human Genetics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and supportive faculty members which make it a great choice.

content.Placements: In our course, nearly 70-89% of students have secured placements in top fertility clinics, with many landing roles as laboratory technicians and embryologists at competitive entry-level salaries. As part of the curriculum, all students are guaranteed internships in their final semester, providing them with hands-on learning experiences alongside experienced embryologists and gynecologists.
content.Infrastructure: The campus offers excellent Wi-Fi with spacious classrooms and a well-equipped library with access to books and journals. Sports include cricket, football, kabaddi, basketball with courts. Hostels are well-equipped with 24-hour hot water, Wi-Fi, medical facilities, spacious rooms, and hygienic restrooms. The canteen serves a hygienic variety of foods.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors in Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is really great for extracurricular activities and facilities are also great.

content.Placements: The college is not really suitable for a course like physiotherapy but it is okay. We can join it for Bachelors. Placements for Physiotherapy are not that great but we can still join in for a bachelor's and join for some internships during college only for our own experience.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent. Facilities are all fine. The college campus is really clean and beautiful. The hostel facilities are really great like they provide good food which is decent. The hostel timings are fine. Wardens are really helpful and it is on the college campus.

admission_overview.college_name: Garden City University Course Admissions: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Garden City University admission for academic session 2024-2025 is open. Garden City University offers admission to various UG and PG courses such as BTech, BCA, BCom, BSc, MBA, MSc, etc., in the stream of Engineering, Commerce, Science, Management, etc. Garden City University admission to these courses is both merit and entrance-based. Interested students can visit the official website ofGarden City Universityto apply for the course of their choice.

Garden City University accepts national-level exams such as JEE Main, COMEDK, KCET, etc for admission to its BTech programme. For other programmes admission is subject to the last qualifying exams. Check below City University course along with eligibility and selection criteria for the Garden:
UG degree with 50% aggregate in the respective discipline, including language from a recognised university

Garden City Universityfeesfor all courses vary depending on the duration and type of the course that candidates choose. The fees range from INR 1 lakh to INR 14 lakh for the courses offered. Candidates must pay a caution deposit of INR 5000 along with fees. Find below the course-wise fees for Garden City University 2024:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
To get admission at Garden City University candidates must follow the entire admission procedure of the Garden City University. Find below the admission process for Garden City University 2024:
Step 1: Garden City Registration

Candidates must visit the official website(https://admissions.gardencity.university/)to register at the university's official website. Candidates must provide a valid email and phone number to register.
Step 2: Garden City Application process

The application process is completely online, which is available at the university's official website. Candidates must fill out the application form with all the required details. While submitting the form candidates must pay an amount of INR 2000 as an application fee.
Step 3: Garden City Conditional Offer Letter

The submitted application form will be scrutinised based on the eligibility criteria. Shortlisted candidates will receive an offer letter, where all the conditions required for the course's admission will be mentioned. Candidates must meet all the conditions mentioned in the Conditional Offer Letter.
Step 4: Garden City University Provisional Admission Letter
Once candidates meet all the conditions mentioned in the 'Conditional Offer Letter' they can obtain the enrollment letter. Candidates can now pay the course fee and finalise their seats.
Check out the below video for more information:

faqs.question: Can I get admission at Garden City University in BTech if my rank is between 57000 and 58000?

Unless the candidate belongs to some other category or domicile, one can not afford to score less than this. With this rank, there is a probability of getting admission however since, the cut offs keep changing from round to round, better ranks definitely increases your chances of getting admission in Garden City University

faqs.question: How can students get admission to the BTech course at Garden City University?
faqs.answer: To get admission to BTech programme at Garden City University Bangalore, aspirants must fulfil the eligibility criteria set by the university in the first place. Candidates who clear the Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) in Biotechnology/ Chemistry/ Biology/ Technical Vocational are eligible to apply for this particular course.  The selection for the BTech course is based on a valid score of the respective entrance examinations. Aspirants can qualify

faqs.question: What is the BTech cutoff for SC and ST categories at Garden City University?
faqs.answer: Garden City University BTech cutoff 2023 for Computer Science Engineering was 76208 for SC and 76208 for ST category. While the admissions are based on the scores/rank obtained in COMEDK, the last cut offs also change a lot depending on All India quota or Home State. It also varies if the applicant is a female.

faqs.question: What will happen if someone misses the internal exam at Garden City University?
faqs.answer: If a student misses the internal examination of Garden City University, then they will have to submit an application. If there are Medical reasons involved, then students must submit the Medical certificate. The students will have to give the internal exams again as passing in internal examinations is mandatory.

faqs.question: How to get admission to MSc course at Garden City University?
faqs.answer: Only those candidates who have passed graduation and have received bachelor's in BSc are eligible to apply for admission to the MSc course at Garden City University. As per the selection process for MSc at Garden City University, there are no requirements to qualify for any entrance examination. Admissions are offered to various courses based on the merit of the last qualifying examination. To know the complete details for the Garden City University MSc course,click here.

faqs.question: What is the last date to register for JEE Mains session 2 in 2025?
faqs.answer: Candidates who wish to register for the session 2 JEE Mains can do so in the month of February. The last date to register for the session 2 of JEE Mains is at the end of February. This date has already passed so candidates will need to appear for other exams like the COMEDK and CET exams that are still ongoing. More information on these exams can be found on their respective official website.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BE courses at Garden City University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BE courses at Garden City University is INR 13.2 Lacs in 2025. These fee amounts are subject to changes. Also, candidates are reminded to keep in mind that the aforementioned amount is just the tuition fee. Candidates may need to incurr addiitonal expenses to be able to pursue BE courses at Garden City University.

faqs.question: Is the COMEDK exam conducted in offline mode?
faqs.answer: No, the COMEDK exam 2025 is not an offline mode exam. The COMEDK 2025 exam is an online mode exam only and any COMEDK exam conducted in a different manner will not be acceptable for admissions. For any information regarding COMEDK exam syllabus, code of conduct, list of banned items and more, candidates are advised to check the official website for the COMEDK 2025 exam.

Direct admission is possible for some courses but not all courses.

placement_report.college_name: Garden City University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Garden City University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: Garden City University has not released the placement report for 2023 yet. However, as per the NIRF report 2023, the median package offered to UG (3 years) and PG (2 years) during placements 2022 stood at INR 4.5 LPA and INR 7.5 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 388 UG (3 years) and 146 PG (2 years) students were placed during Garden City University placements 2022.

The career advisory and placement services (CAPS) facilitate uplifting the employability of its students. Garden City University assists and provides opportunities to students through its sought-after campus placement process. Additionally, the University has separate provisions for students who are interested in entrepreneurship, further education, research projects, etc. The Garden City University placement cell is connected with leading companies and thriving start-ups to deploy well-trained students.
The University offers a wide range of UG and PG courses. Some of the popular courses are MSc , BSc , BTech , and BPT .

tables.context: Has Garden City University Bangalore collaborated

faqs.question: Does Garden City University have good placements?
faqs.answer: Placements at Garden City University are sector-wise distributed with opportunities in Education (12%), Sales (17%), Information Technology (20%), Operations (25%), and Business Development (26%).

faqs.question: What is the average package offered to BSc students of Garden City University who received placements?
faqs.answer: According to the NIRF report for the session 2022-2023, the average package for under 3 years UG courses students who received placements was around INR 3.6 LPA. The data for highest package for BSc students of Garden City University is unavailable. The NIRF report also presents the data regarding how mny students received placements after graduation. According to the report, around 77 students received placements in the year 2022.

faqs.question: How many students of Garden City University BSc course got placements?
faqs.answer: The exact data for how many students of BSc course at Garden City University received placements is unavailable. According to the NIRF report, there were 77 students of UG courses of under 3 years at Garden City University who received placements in the year 2022. These students were placed with an average package of 3.6 LPA acording to the NIRF report 2022 on Garden City University.

faqs.question: Has Garden City University Bangalore collaborated with any college or university?
faqs.answer: Garden City University Bangalore has signed MoU with the world-renowned international and national universities and colleges. Garden City University Bangalore has collaborated with various universities, industries, and colleges. For this, the university has signed MoUs with several institutions and companies. The below-mentioned table reflects on the Garden City University Bangalore collaborations: Garden City University Bangalore Collaborations Hadassah Academic College, Jerusalem Universiti Putra Malaysia Ahmad Dahlan University, Yogyakarta Sorbonne University, Paris University Camilo Jose Cela, Spain Queen Mary University of London King’s College, London - -

reviews.review_heading: I'm really very satisfied with the college, the teachers are very good and friendly.
reviews.review_text: The courses and hostel offered by our college are really very good. We have high-speed Internet, Wi-Fi connection, the library is clean and there are many books we can find, and the classrooms are clean enough with smart technologies, ACs, and good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied and can be better at taking students out for exceptions or any events.
reviews.review_text: Good library. The university has Wi-Fi and smart classrooms with AC, but the issue is that students are not allowed to use the lifts. For example, if a classroom is on the 4th floor, students are required to use the stairs, which is very tiring and unfair. Sometimes there is a power cut, but it lasts only for a short time. Within a few minutes, the power is restored so that the smart board and fans are turned on again for both students and faculty.

reviews.review_heading: Quite a good place with a student-friendly atmosphere and quality of education.
reviews.review_text: Campus is equipped with good Wi-Fi facilities, and labs consist of necessary equipment for examinations. Classrooms are spacious, though I feel they could do with some added ventilation. Library has a large variety of books and computers on various topics and is peaceful for research and reading. Girls' and boys' hostels come in various sharing options. They are well-maintained, spacious, and have individual lockers and study tables for each student. Common washrooms and separate ones, and no is...

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and supportive faculty members which make it a great choice.
reviews.review_text: The campus offers excellent Wi-Fi with spacious classrooms and a well-equipped library with access to books and journals. Sports include cricket, football, kabaddi, basketball with courts. Hostels are well-equipped with 24-hour hot water, Wi-Fi, medical facilities, spacious rooms, and hygienic restrooms. The canteen serves a hygienic variety of foods.

reviews.review_heading: It is really great for extracurricular activities and facilities are also great.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent. Facilities are all fine. The college campus is really clean and beautiful. The hostel facilities are really great like they provide good food which is decent. The hostel timings are fine. Wardens are really helpful and it is on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well-managed and everything is working. The hostel is also good and they clean every once and week. Food quality is also very good. Sports are also considered in our college. All the facilities are provided which are required for the students.

reviews.review_heading: I’m absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is pretty decent, but it doesn't provide food. There is no library in the hostel, but there is Wi-Fi. There is one sports room to play games and such. Wardens are good enough. There are no time restrictions, but the gate closes at 10.

reviews.review_heading: Balancing academics and extracurricular activities together without effecting academic pressure.
reviews.review_text: GCUs overall infrastructure is good enough for students have the potential to gain knowledge. Labs and the library are good. The hostel facilities are a little bit expensive according to area. Local surroundings are not at all good. Local citizens of the area create unnecessary trouble for people from the north area.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and a decent college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The classrooms are clean and comfortable. You have almost all the facilities that are required. Hostel facilities are only for girls. We do have a lot of PGs around the college. The food in the hostel and everything are decent and good.

reviews.review_heading: GCU has an average college life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are above-average. The hostel is also pretty much good but recently they have increased the fees a lot which has made the services below-average. The quality of food served is not that good. Sports are average if you are really interested.

reviews.review_heading: This college is totally value for money.
reviews.review_text: The facilities include a big food court, futsal turf, basketball, football ground, badminton, and other indoor games. It also has programs and events, which make campus life more fun. Classrooms are always clean, and we even have Wi-Fi, which makes things easier inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: A guide to my journey in GCU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, with plenty of space and accessible classrooms and laboratories. We had full access to the library during college hours, as well as the food court and most other facilities. Since I was not in the hostel, I don't have firsthand experience, but I visited a friend's room once, and it was spacious and well-maintained. There are also various food options available.

reviews.review_heading: I love Garden City University.
reviews.review_text: In college, we have a library that is easily accessible and labs for individual courses. The facilities are very good, and they help a lot. The food court is large, with many options available. The college gives importance to sports and other activities. Hostel facilities are good, but no food is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Garden City University.
reviews.review_text: The campus here is very good and very well maintained, with lots of greenery around us. The social life is also great here as Garden City University hostel students from various states and cities and even countries get to learn new cultures, and the faculty here is also very good, helpful, and supportive in nature.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching method is not so good, but the teachers are highly knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: The library has all the course books, and we also have plenty of games, but the Wi-Fi doesn't work most of the time. The food is below average because it has too much tasting power (MSG). The library also has computers, and there are many indoor and outdoor games, as well as club activities if interested.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Garden City University

likes.text: Capgemini, Accenture, Earnest&Young and many other companies come to the college, providing placements to the students.
The placements are good for the students of management and the other courses with the sufficient satisfied salary.

The college has great infracture with updated classrooms and labs and also haa a restaurant for hotel management students.

The duration of all these programmes ranges from three months to two years depending on the stream of choice. All the certificate programmes cover the fundamentals of their respective stream after which students are exposed to the detailed 3D module. At the end of the programme, candidates are required to specialise in an elective out of many to complete the certificate programmes. individual_reviews.course: Program in Digital Marketing - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Awesome experience of my life and very good.

content.Placements: The placement support is 100%. Placements depend on students' talents and skills. Our college provides internships. There are no campus placement offers. Interviews are going on in our city. Roles offered are junior graphic designer, etc. The average salary package offered is 1 LPA. Students should have skills and have to work with high quality.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is not provided. We have all computer labs. They have laptops. There are digital marketing classrooms with Wi-Fi.

individual_reviews.course: PDP in 3D Animation Visual Effects - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the overall teaching and everything in our institute.

content.Placements: Most of our batchmates got placed at that time. Zica is an institute of Zee company, so the top recruiting companies include zee industry. Almost 70-80% of the students got placed or opened their own small business. At the time of placements, it starts with the internship and lower roles and posts are offered to the students. Otherwise, everything is good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Zica institute is very good. I liked classrooms as it is a well-reputed college. Many other facilities provided are also up to the mark like additional teaching equipment, necessary guidance, etc. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and everything is good. The library is a little disappointing, and there are very less outdoor sports and games.

paragraphs: ZICA Indore admission 2025is currently open. Check the detailed step below:
1: ZICA Indore Application Process
The institute accepts applications via online mode. Candidates can visit ZICA's official website (www.zicaindore.com) to apply.
2: Selection
Candidates are selected based on merit.
3: Final Admission
After selection students need to go through the counselling round for document verification. Following this, students can pay theZICA Indore feeto confirm their seat.

ZICA Indore fee structureincludes various components, out of which some are paid one-time while others are paid semester-wise. courses_data.description: ZICA Indore offers certificate courses for two months to one-year in various areas. The institute offers certificate in DSLR Filmmaking, Graphics Designing, Game Arts & Design, Digital Marketing, Photography, etc. The institute offers admission to candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates who have completed Class 10 can apply for any of the offered certificate courses.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for certificate courses at ZICA Indore?
faqs.answer: ZICA Indore selects candidates for admission to certificate courses based on their merit. The institute considers the qualifying exam scores of the candidates for admission. Aspirants who are selected have to further report at the campus for document verification and fee payment.

courses_data.name: ZICA Indore BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: ZICA Indore offers a three-year full-timeBSc in Animation and Multimediaprogramme. The course is offered at the UG level in association with Renaissance University, Indore. This is a dual certificate programme in which students earn a BSc degree from the university and PDP in Animation & Visual Effects from ZICA Animation Institute. Candidates who have completed Class 12 in any stream can apply for the BSc programme.

faqs.question: Does ZICA Indore offer a BSc course?
faqs.answer: Yes, ZICA Institute Indore offers a three-year BSc course in Animation and Multimedia. It is a dual certification programme. On course completion, candidates earn a BSc degree from Renaissance University and PDP in Animation and Visual Effects from ZICA Animation Institute.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for BSc at ZICA Indore?
faqs.answer: There are a total of40 seatsavailable in BSc programme of ZICA Indore. The institute offers seats to candidates in the BSc programme based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants must score well in Class 12 to get admission in the BSc course. Once selected, aspirants have to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at ZICA Indore?
faqs.answer: ZICA Indore offers admission to candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants should have passed Class 12 for UG courses and Class 10 for Diploma and certificate programmes. Candidates should have documents proving their eligibility at the time of admission. Once selected, aspirants have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy of ZICA Institute, Indore?
faqs.answer: ZICA Institute runds under the guidance of ZEE Learn Company. As per the company guidelines, the fee once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances. Students can get in touch with the admission office of ZICA Indore to get more details regarding the same.

faqs.question: Does ZICA Institute, Indore accept ISC score?
faqs.answer: Yes, ZICA Institute Indore accepts ISC score. The students who have passed Class 10/Class 12 are eligible for admission in the ZICA courses. Moreover, the institute also accepts scores of CBSE and MPBSE boards. At the time of admission or form filling, students should have the original/copies of the mark sheet of Class 10/Class 12.

placement_data.title: ZICA Indore Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The university has not released the placement report for the year 2023. However, as per Shiksha review, the highest and lowest package offered was INR 5 LPA and INR 2 LPA during the ZICA Indore recent placement drive. Apart from this, nearly 70% to 80% of students were placed during the recent placement drive. Many top recruiters visited the campus such as Redefine, Redchillies VFX, and Social Squad among others.
This is to note that, the placement stats mentioned here are gathered from Shiksha review. Hence, the stats may vary further.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the overall teaching and everything in our institute.

Many other facilities provided are also up to the mark like additional teaching equipment, necessary guidance, etc. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and everything is good. The library is a little disappointing, and there are very less outdoor sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: The best animation institute in Indore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of ZICA is very nice. They provide us with theoretical classes as well as practice labs differently. We have smart classes, and the infrastructure is fully air-conditioned. We have a clean and healthy atmosphere here. Highly advanced server technology is provided in each system.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best animation institute in Indore.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure with good lab facilities and classrooms. It is a fully self-contained campus comprising of everything that students would ever require on campus. There are 4 labs in college with good internet facilities. The classrooms are also equipped with teaching aids such as LCDs, systems, ACs, etc. This college is must recommended.

reviews.review_heading: ZICA - The most amazing institute for animation and VFX in town!
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure consists of well-furnished labs along with the clean and hygienic atmosphere. The classes are air-conditioned with comfortable seating. Every class consists of good projectors where every student learns on a big screen. The highly configured systems are there in practice labs.

reviews.review_heading: Really good at maintaining the name of its parent body - Cheers ! ZEE Network.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure consists of well-maintained air-conditioned labs along with highly integrated systems to work on. The institute also has ample space for the interior designing students with various basic amenities like designing tables, audio-visual, classrooms, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ZICA, Indore.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on the college premises, and the speed of Wi-Fi is also good. Labs, classrooms and the library are regularly cleaned and maintained well. The quality of food in our college is good. They prepare different food items on different days, and they provide special food on special occasions.

reviews.review_heading: Best institute in central India.
reviews.review_text: Small but good ambience. Sufficient pc available in lab and separate lab available for students who on laptop. The latest magazine and all-important books are available in Library and easily available for all students. Classroom facilitated with AC, charging point enough sunlight and ventilation. Providing information for hostel accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are absolutely good. It has average placements and a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in classrooms but they rarely work due to excessive loads. 4 labs are provided with top-notch interiors and all working PCs. Classrooms are well technical equipped with projectors, screens, whiteboards and everything. But it is just a floor of a building that's it.

college_info.college_name: International School of Design, Kandivali

highlights.summary:
International School of Design, also known as INSD Kandivali is a private institution located in Kandivali West, Mumbai. The institute is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC). INSD has won a national award for the Best Design School in India in 2017. Apart from this, in the same year, the institute was also ranked in Top 10 Colleges in India by the Higher Education Magazine.

Currently, the institute offers degree and diploma courses in Fashion Design, Interior Design, Jewelry Design, Bag Designing and Accessories Designing. The fashion courses offered at the institute include theory as well as practical implementation with the main emphasis being on creative work in the studios. The diploma courses are taught entirely in the studios rather than the conventional classes.

Apart from the course curriculum, the institute conducts various co-curricular activities such as field trips, fashion shows, awards, party and many more. The institute has a total of eight faculty heads, including all departments. Some of the training and placement partners of the institute are Mia by Tanishq, au Finja, Skyler, Marks and Spencer, Benetton, Manubhai and many more. Apart from the regular programmes, the institute also offers a Khat Work Embroidery course with a duration of one month.

Currently, the institute offers BDes, BSc, MDes, MSc, MBA, diploma, UG diploma, advanced diploma and certificate programmes in Fashion Design, Interior Design, Jewelry Design, Bag Designing and Accessories Designing. Admission to all these programmes is conducted online through the official website of the institute. Candidates need to register themselves for the complete application process. Details regarding all the programmes are mentioned below:

Check detailed INSD Kandivali admission process

At the UG level, the institute offers BDes and BSc in five different specialisations with a course duration of three years. MBA, MSc and MDes are offered at the PG level. The duration of PG programmes is two years. Apart from the UG and PG programmes, the institute offers a three-year UG diploma, two-year advanced diploma, one-year diploma and six months certificate programmes under various specialisations. Given below is the name of the specialisations along with the eligibility criteria for some of the major programmes:

Check details regarding INSD Kandivali courses and fees

The institute offers placement assistance to its students. Some of the top recruiters of previous years included Mia by Tanishq, Manubhai, PC Chandra Jewellers, AU Finja, Fine Edge, Skyler, Study Janak, Marks and Spencer, Dhruv Global Ltd, Benetton, Boutique, Rathy, Skyler and many more.

Check details regarding INSD Kandivali placements

There are no scholarships offered by INSD Kandivali. However, students can avail various scholarships offered at INSD. The scholarships are offered across 55 centres of INSD across the country. Some of the scholarships offered by the institute are mentioned below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Interior Design and Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty is absolutely excellent.

review_content.Placements: Almost all the students had the opportunity for the placements. Approximately 70 - 80 % of students were placed from our course. I am presently studying in my first year so I'm not aware of the recruiting companies. Interior designing is the top role offered in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not that bad. Wi-Fi is available but sometimes lacking whiles using it. We have lots of shops for snacks surrounding our institute so there is no need for the mess or canteen. We have a good sitting arrangement and also countable students are taken as the faculty can focus on us.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Interior Design and Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: All the staff members are good.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 65-80% of students got placements from the previous batch. As I am in my first year, I am not much aware of recruiting companies. As we are studying, we haven't yet got placed. Furniture designing, interior decor, etc., are the roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not that bad. Seating arrangements are good. We are provided with good lights and air-conditioning in all classrooms. The college is surrounded by cafes and shops near the institute, so there's no requirement for any kind of mess or canteens.

reviews_list.batch_info: Advanced Diploma in Interior Design and Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good and keep on improving every negative review they get.

review_content.Placements: I am in 2nd year, so have not been placed yet. Its been heard from the seniors that college provides good opportunities for placements. Many of the students got opportunities in the middle of the year as they started working as a freelancer, many got opportunity to work as a designer too.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. The classrooms are neat and clean with proper Wi-Fi and good ventilation, Proper drafting tables, Showcase students work and are air-conditioned. Clean and neat washrooms are there in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Interior Design and Technology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: It is a very good designing college. College offers practical knowledge. There are about 15 to 20 students in a batch. The salary package is 3 LPA for the 3rd year B.Sc. Interior design degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has very spacious classrooms and kits for interior design students. There are sewing machines for the fashion students and projector screen for the lectures to explain. The quality of the infrastructure is average.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful, qualified and are always ready to help the students for any kind of topic related to the coarse. The exams are average. There are theory as well as practical papers which include software drawings.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Interior Design and Technology - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best private institute for interior design.

review_content.Placements: The institute provides its students with placement opportunities and assistance. Guidance is also given on further studies, career-related workshops and training. The institute help connect employers with students seeking internships, part-time or full-time employment.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is good. It's a professional, creative yet comfortable environment. The classrooms are air-conditioned, clean and well lit. The institute organizes field visits along with frequent workshops. Students are also given different opportunities to participate and showcase their projects. Wi-Fi and other equipment are also provided by the institute.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion Design and Technology - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with this best fashion designing college in Mumbai.

review_content.Placements: During our course, almost all the students got the placement in Mumbai, a few interned at boutiques, and a few worked as assistant fashion stylists. I got my first internship as an assistant designer at a fashion studio. INSD Kandivali offered different courses like diploma, advanced diploma, B.Sc. in Fashion Designing, and M.Sc. in fashion designing. Apart from this, INSD offered Interior Designing and Jewellery Designing courses also. INSD Kandivali provided regular field trips to students and also held a fashion show at the year end.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at INSD Kandivali is not very huge, but we got all the required facilities as our batches were small and so each student got to interact personally with our mentors. INSD Kandivali provided all the necessary departments at their branch for garment-making teaching, illustration room, presentation room, etc. As per my personal experience, I prefer INSD Kandivali to every fashion aspirants as it has small student batches, and each student had personal interaction with teachers.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best institutes for all purposes of designing courses.
reviews.review_text: The ambiance of the infrastructure is surrounded by creative artwork which helps enthusiast students to focus on creativity. They also conduct different activities such as field visits, fashion shows, and workshops. The environment of the institute is eco-friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good. Will surely recommended .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Classrooms are comfortable. Wi-Fi connection is good. Facilities are good. Clean classroom and washrooms. Seating capacity & arrangements are comfortable. Teachers are very kind to help and has special attention to each and every student.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. You can learn a lot of things here.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms in our college are of middle size. There are no mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports and games, library.

reviews.review_heading: The best college of 2019-20.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi available in the classroom and was free for the students and there are so huge classes. Teacher staff was very good and talkative. the chemistry lab is very good. the canteen is very good and the food is available at a reasonable price and the quality is good. Anybody can eat that food. I like this college.

faqs.answer: A:    For the Bachelor of Design (B.Des) program, the National Institute of Design (NID) Jorhat has a thorough admissions procedure that is based on the NID Entrance Test (DAT). An essential assessment tool for determining an applicant's level of creativity, problem-solving, design thinking, and visual communication is the DAT. Exam content is divided into two sections:The timed multiple-choice DAT PrelimsThe written and practical DAT Mains, which include tasks involving drawing, modeling, and visualization.Entry into NID Jorhat is through a multi-phase process. Candidates take part in DAT Prelims after registering online, and those who pass move on to DAT Mains. The DAT Mains shortlisted candidates move on to a studio exam where their design abilities, conceptual thinking, and capacity for both solo and group work are assessed. Those who perform well in the studio exam then go through an interview process where their communication abilities, fit for the B.Des program, goals for their careers, and capacity to explain the design thinking process are evaluated.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by NID Jorhat for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    No, candidates who are looking for BDes course admission at NID Jorhat must sit and appear for DAT. Design Aptitude Test or DAT is that part of design exams that checks the creativity of the candidates. It is not easy to crack DAT section in a short period of time. One should have a good practice of drawing, sketching and on the spot design-solution to clear DAT.
faqs.question: Can I get admission for B.Des at NID Jorhat without DAT?

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee of NID DAT 2025 for the BDes for General, General-EWS, OBC-NCL candidates is INR 3,000. SC, ST, PwD candidates only ned to pay INR 1,500. However note that the application fees for overseas candidates seeking admission to supernumerary seats is INR 5000. In case of the M.Des programme, the application fees for General, General-EWS, OBC-NCL candidates applying for one discipline is INR 3,000. If two disciplines are chosen, the application fee is INR 6000. Meanwhile, SC, ST, PwD candidate need to pay INR 1,500 for one discipline, and INR 3000 for two disciplines.

paragraphs: National Institute of Design, Jorhatadmission 2025is open now. The institute offers BDes courses at the UG PG level. To get admission to NID, Jorhat candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. TheNational Institute of Design, Jorhatapplication processis conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutNID Jorhat course admission2025.

Once the candidate gets admission at NID, Bhopal, they have to complete a mandatory programme. candidates admitted to B. Des. Program at NID MP will be required to attend a mandatory Foundation Program of one year duration. Check out the following video for information regarding theNID admission process:

NID, Jorhat courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfill the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. Allotment of a discipline of choice is based on acandidate’s meritand preference only after successful completion of theFoundationProgramme. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forNational Institute of Design, Jorhat courses:
Read More:NID Jorhat Prospectus 2024-2025
NID DAT BDes admission Handout 2024-2025

NID Jorhat feeis inclusive of multiple components such as tuition fee, hostel fee, caution fee, etc. The caution fee is a refundable component. Moreover, candidates may have to pay the course fee semester-wise. For any fee concession details, candidates should contact the NID Jorhat admission office. Tabulated below is the fee and seats of BDes:

NID, Assam offers full-time four-year BDes with specialisation streams of Industrial Design, Communication Design, and Textile & Apparel Design with a multi-disciplinary approach to design education. Students can check the seat matrix below:

NID Jorhat admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation of the entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in the. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in NID Jorhat:
STEP 1: NID Jorhat Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online by visiting the the official website of the institute. The application fee is INR 3,000.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The selection criteria at NID Jorhat are based on entrance exam scores. However, candidates have to complete the last educational qualification as per the respective courses set by the college. Students are selected based on the entrance exam of DAT.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.answer: No, candidates who are looking for BDes course admission at NID Jorhat must sit and appear for DAT. Design Aptitude Test or DAT is that part of design exams that checks the creativity of the candidates. It is not easy to crack DAT section in a short period of time. One should have a good practice of drawing, sketching and on the spot design-solution to clear DAT.

faqs.question: What are the various factors that will be considered for preparing NID DAT cut-off?
faqs.answer: Cut-off for NID DAT will be prepared based on factors like total number of applications, seat intake for the applied programme, category under which admission is sought, and merit rank of the applicant in NID DAT 2026. Each of these factors are variables. For example, number of applications may vary from one category to another. Cut-off would also vary. The cut-off represents the minimum marks a candidate needs to secure in his or her category to get admission to the B. Des or M.Des programme.

college_info.intro:
Swami Vivekanand University MP gives UG and PG courses across multiple streams such as Education, Law, Science, Hotel Management, Nursing, etc. The popular programmes at Vivekanand University Sagar are MBA, BSc, and BTech.
Vivekanand University MP has a full-time, 4-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech courses given at the university cover courses in the areas of Mechanical, Civil, Electrical and Electronics, Agriculture, Information Technology, etc. The MBA programme given by the Swami Vivekanand University Sagar Madhya Pradesh is a 2-year programme. It is given in several specialisations, including Fire and Safety Management, Disaster Management, and Hotel Management.
Vivekanand University Sagar MP also gives several programmes in distance learnig mode. Below mentioned are Swami Vivekanand University popular programmes:

faqs.answer: Swami Vivekananda University is a private University managed by Prakhar Pragya Siksha Prasar Avum Samaj Kalayan Samiti, Madhya Pradesh. The University is UGC approved and is recognised by AICTE and ISO. The university offers several programs across various streams of Arts, Commerce, Science, Designing, Engineering etc.Admissions to Swami Vivekananda University are based on the scores obtained in Entrance exams. MBA and M.Tech admissions are based on the scores in National entrance exams like CAT and GATE; whereas admissions to the undergraduate degrees are based on the merit scores of the candidates in the qualifying exam.The University offers a Bachelor’s programme in Aeronautical Engineering. Admission to the programme is based on the qualifying scores of the candidates in JEE Main followed by a personal interview round. Applications to admissions are available in both Online and Offline modes.The University holds a good placement record; companies like IDEA, INFOSYS, Airtel, Dabur etc. are some of the top recruiters in the placement drive at the campus. The institute also offers scholarships to the poor, needy as well as meritorious students as per the scholarship programmes by the government. Students have to apply for the scholarships at the starting of the academic session with the required documents.

individual_reviews.title: Good college with excellent faculty.

content.Placements: No placement and no company ever visit for my course. The students have to do their internship by themselves, and no support is provided by the college. In course, the internship can be done with own money. I have done my internship from TTC Hisar with the amount of 10,000 rupees.
content.Infrastructure: The campus consists of huge buildings with different courses. There are 151 courses done by Swami Vivekanand University. It also has hostel facilities with separate hostel of boys and girls. Classrooms are very spacious and ventilated. Computer labs are high-tech.

admission_overview.title: Swami Vivekanand University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Swami Vivekanand University admissions are done on both merit and entrance basis as per the course. For online process, apply through the offcial website. The university offers various UG, PG, Diploma and certificate level courses. These courses are offered across various fields Science, Pharmacy, Education, Law, Computer Applications, etc. Also known as SVN University Sagar, the university is located in Madhya Pradesh. Read the following article to learn all about the admission procedure, courses, and admission criteria of Swami Vivekanand University.

eligibility_selection.title: Swami Vivekanand University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Swami Vivekanand University course admission is subject to the fulfilment of preset admission criteria. Students wishing to enrol into the university need to make sure that they meet both the minimum educational qualifications and the selection criteria to get a seat. Admissions are primarily merit-based. The university may accept valid scores obtained in national or state-level entrance examinations. Further, students may have to participate in state-level counselling.

paragraphs: Swami Vivekanand University's admission processinvolves application, selection, counselling (if applicable) and admission confirmation. Students need to satisfy the admission criteria to get admission into the university. The application process of the university commences online. Eligible students interested in applying can follow the s explained below to complete the admission process of Swami Vivekanand University.
Application and Registration
Log on to the official website and apply online by filling out the basic details.
Shortlisting Process

Students are mainly selected on a merit basis. However SVU Sagar may also consider entrance exam scores depending on the programme. Students need to provide scores obtained in the last qualifying examination. Exams such as CAT/ MAT can be taken into consideration for MBA admission. For certain courses students may have to participate in Gujarat counselling for seat allotment.
Merit List and Admission Confirmation
Once a seat is offered students need to report for document verification. After that paythe feesfor seat confirmation.

The total tuition fees for the university's courses can include components like tuition fees, library fees, and more. Some of the SVN University fees are charged only once during the time of admissions, while the remaining are to be paid as per the university's guidelines. hostel_campus.college_name: Swami Vivekanand University Sagar Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Academic Facilities: Well-equipped classrooms, laboratories, libraries, and computer centers to support academic learning and research activities.
Hostel Accommodation: On-campus hostel facilities for students, especially those coming from different cities or states.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with excellent faculty.
reviews.review_text: The campus consists of huge buildings with different courses. There are 151 courses done by Swami Vivekanand University. It also has hostel facilities with separate hostel of boys and girls. Classrooms are very spacious and ventilated. Computer labs are high-tech.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement, good facilities and really good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: The college is spread over approximately 65 acres with highly facilitated infrastructure. Labs, classrooms, and the library are well maintained on the campus. The hostel facilities are also well maintained, with good food available in the mess. Additionally, sports and games are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: SVN University Sagar MBA Review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is modern, featuring contemporary building designs, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, computer labs with smart technology, and widespread Wi-Fi across the campus. The hostel is conveniently located near the institute building, and regular sports activities are organized.

reviews.review_heading: SVN has a nice campus and placement service.
reviews.review_text: It is a modern-type institution with the best facilities and a large campus for all course students. Classrooms are highly facilitated and well designed. Wi-fi services are open to everyone around campus. The canteen is close to the institute, and the food is excellent. Sports activities are held every weekend.

reviews.review_heading: Swami Vivekanand Vishwavidyalaya review.
reviews.review_text: This university has a modern, advanced-designed infrastructure, well-furnished classrooms, and an A.C. cabin for officials only, a fully-stocked library, and labs for other practical works. Here is a hostel outside of the city with a nice mess and good food quality; the canteen food is very tasty and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is large with modern facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides modern infrastructure. The campus is well-designed. We have a library, a canteen, high technology classrooms, digital screens, Wi-Fi, etc. The hostel is good. It is near our college. It provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: SVN SAGAR campus life experience.
reviews.review_text: SVN provides a better experience on campus. The campus grounds are large and include a sports activity facility. The classroom is fully clean and equipped with an air conditioning facility. The hostel capacity at SVN is a maximum of 200 students. In a hostel, there is a bed, a fan in the rooms, 24*7 electricity, and no shortage of places in the hostel or compound. So the overall average development in the SVN Institute that students expect is good.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel provides no such facility. It provides ground for playing, and teachers were helpful. The classrooms were fine, and the library was also good. The food quality was not better. It also provides medical facilities. Sports and tournaments were held in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college and I'm very much satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are quite good and helpful for students. Faculty members are willing to offer help. The hostels are average if we compare them to some private colleges, but are above average if compared to the college of the same city. A library facility is provided to students.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities. It provides good practice of field & practical knowledge
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the University is very good. Classrooms and labs are very clean. Large hall for programme, playground. For agriculture course, field practice is also available. Wi-fi facility also available in university. But currently, there is no hostel facility for students. Student can live in nearby colonies on rent.

reviews.review_heading: The college is shaping future engineers.
reviews.review_text: Swami Vivekananda university is big and awesome. It has the perfect environment and atmosphere which suits the college or university. It has huge labs for the different and separate sections of education. The university has an attractive look at the front and also at the intermediate, there is the big and large playground in the front of the university. Mainly, the university is located on a hill.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, quality of education, discipline.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. It is situated in a big area. The labs are also there, and they also take us to the other places for the practicals. The classroom is fully air-conditioned, and the medical and the library facilites are also there. They give a chance to attend different seminars, and we also get the chances to interact with the companies.

reviews.review_heading: Placement record is not good but teachers are very helpful
reviews.review_text: Labs, the classroom, the library and sports facilities are good. The canteen is very bad. There is no Wi-Fi when I am in the college. The quality of classrooms and labs is good. Also, there are good lab instruments. Lab attendants give us proper knowledge about the experiment. Hostel rooms are good. I didn't face any infrastructure-related issues in my college time. Medical facilities are good as well.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I find the work and facilities at my college to be excellent.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very comfortable and provides good performance, although I don't stay in the hostel. However, the hostel is in very good condition, feels comfortable, and the bedrooms are awesome. The study materials are great, and the owner is an excellent worker. I hope the hostel maintains very good conditions, and the kitchen offers sweet food, served hot.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus with best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is not any hostel or Wi-Fi facility in the college, as it is not even required because all the students are from the local city. But yes, if we talk about sports and games, then there is huge scope; they support all the curricular activities and once a year, a sports meet is also conducted for students.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University (MJRPU) refunds fees under certain circumstances. The refund is given based on the University Grants Commission (UGC) guidelines.According to the guidelines they will charge you some percentage of fees.The charge amount varies based on the time taken for withdrawal from the program.The 100% of refund id given if the withdrawal is made 15 days or more before the Starting of classes.The 90% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made less than 15 days before the starting of classes.The 80% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made 15 days or less after the Starting of classes.The 50% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made 30 days or less, but more than 15 days after the commencement of classes.No refund if the withdrawal is made more than 30 days after the commencement of classes.

course_faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for BSc courses at Mahatma Jyotirao Phule University in 2025?
course_faqs.answer: The tuition fees for BSc courses at Mahatma Jyotirao Phule University in 2025 ranges between INR 81,000 - INR 4.5 lakh. The tuition fee for BSc courses can be charged either on a per annum basis or a per semester basis. Candidates are advised to visit the official website of Mahatma Jyotirao Phule University and check the tuition fee for their chosen BSc course.

course_faqs.question: Dose MJRPU offers BSc scholarships?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University does offer scholarships for its BSc course. The university provides Means-cum-Merit Financial Assistance to its students. Candidates must secure a valid score in their last qualifying exam to be eligible for the scholarship. The student who has secured 60 to 70% marks, will get a 10% Scholarship on tuition fees, and the student who has secured 71 to 80% marks, will get a 12.5% Scholarship on tuition fees.

course_faqs.question: What is the tuition fee structure for the Mahatma Jyotirao Phule University BSc course?
course_faqs.answer: The tuition fee structure varies between different mods of Mahatma Jyotirao Phule University BSc courses. Individual BSc courses usualy follow a per semester structure for their tuition fee while integrated courses follow a per annum structure. However, some courses in either category can have a different fee structure than the rest. review_summary.college_name: MJRPU Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has nice facilities and good infrastructure. It has 2 campuses and is good to take admission.

content.Placements: MJRP University has a peaceful environment and is useful for all types of courses. About 80% of students get placements after completing the degree. There is no fixed average package, and it depends on our percentage and practicals. The average salary is Rs. 40,000 per month, and can be easily earned by an average student in the physiotherapy course. Approximately, all students get internship who are doing a degree from college. It is a budget-friendly college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a study environment and daily classes. It has a nice campus and also a playground. The library has books for every course. A hostel facility is also available with good food. There are helpful colleagues who help us in our studies and extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BBA + MBA - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our batch of integrated BBA+MBA students had a great journey despite having a small class size.

content.Placements: Our batch of integrated BBA and MBA students had a great academic journey. The strength of the students is very low. This year, ICICI has been recruiting for the internships. The top role that was offered to our batch is Relationship Manager, and the average package that was offered is 2.5 lacs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not up to par but they have recently renovated the digital room with the latest digital equipment for the management students. The hostel facilities are designed to offer a comfortable and conducive living environment for students.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (July 2025)- B.Sc. (Hons.) in Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Realistic review of Mahatma jyotirao phoole university.

content.Placements: Yes, the college offers placements if you have a good percentage in your exams and have such qualities, so you will be selected and placed at top firms. I am currently in my first year; that's why I don't have the same amount of knowledge, but I have seen my seniors get placed in various top firms in India.
content.Infrastructure: The college has many labs, like the psychology lab, the physics lab, the chemistry lab, the botany lab, and the and the Zoology lab, and each and every course student has their own classroom. There is no Wi-Fi facility available. There is a very good, spacious library with every book that you need.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of no placements and Scholarships. The faculty and infrastructure are good.

content.Placements: There is no placement in the College for any department. And also, there is no scholarship program for the students. In the future, I would like to prepare for judicial exams. The minimum package for the Judiciary is 10 Lacs annually. I have also done some internships in the Session and High Court to gain more knowledge of law.
content.Infrastructure: It has a separate building, and there are many students in the department. The hostel facility is very good. I have been staying in the hostel for almost 2 years and I really enjoyed it. The Hostel is well maintained, and the rooms are very spacious. There are also other facilities like Libraries and Labs for the students. But there is no Canteen available for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college campus review.

content.Placements: They have no placements in this college. You only get knowledge of coding, web development and Java, but you cannot get a placement because there are no collaborations with the companies by the college. You get amazing marks in the college but you don't get placed here.
content.Infrastructure: As a student of this University, I am interested in Computer Science whose faculty teaches very clearly and gives us proper knowledge of the course which is very good. We have an unlimited Wi-Fi, 2 computer labs, a library and a hostel for girls.

faqs.question: Does Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University refund fees?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University (MJRPU) refunds fees under certain circumstances. The refund is given based on the University Grants Commission (UGC) guidelines.According to the guidelines they will charge you some percentage of fees.The charge amount varies based on the time taken for withdrawal from the program. The 100% of refund id given if the withdrawal is made 15 days or more before the Starting of classes.The 90% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made less than 15 days before the starting of classes.The 80% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made 15 days or less after the Starting of classes.The 50% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made 30 days or less, but more than 15 days after the commencement of classes.No refund if the withdrawal is made more than 30 days after the commencement of classes.

For more information, please visit Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole official website or admission cell.

hostel_campus.college_name: MJRPU Jaipur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It has nice facilities and good infrastructure. It has 2 campuses and is good to take admission.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a study environment and daily classes. It has a nice campus and also a playground. The library has books for every course. A hostel facility is also available with good food. There are helpful colleagues who help us in our studies and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Our batch of integrated BBA+MBA students had a great journey despite having a small class size.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not up to par but they have recently renovated the digital room with the latest digital equipment for the management students. The hostel facilities are designed to offer a comfortable and conducive living environment for students.

reviews.review_heading: Realistic review of Mahatma jyotirao phoole university.
reviews.review_text: The college has many labs, like the psychology lab, the physics lab, the chemistry lab, the botany lab, and the and the Zoology lab, and each and every course student has their own classroom. There is no Wi-Fi facility available. There is a very good, spacious library with every book that you need.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of no placements and Scholarships. The faculty and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: It has a separate building, and there are many students in the department. The hostel facility is very good. I have been staying in the hostel for almost 2 years and I really enjoyed it. The Hostel is well maintained, and the rooms are very spacious. There are also other facilities like Libraries and Labs for the students. But there is no Canteen available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college campus review.
reviews.review_text: As a student of this University, I am interested in Computer Science whose faculty teaches very clearly and gives us proper knowledge of the course which is very good. We have an unlimited Wi-Fi, 2 computer labs, a library and a hostel for girls.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. The campus is fully connected to high-speed Wi-Fi. Classrooms and labs are excellent. The food served in the mess is good. They provide games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very nice infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities available in the course and hostel at the college. Wi-fi, lab, classroom, library—all the necessary facilities are available in the college. The quality of the facilities is decent. Mess and canteen food are acceptable. There are sports facilities, and the number of medical facilities is also high.

reviews.review_heading: The worst decision of my life is, joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, and labs are not available. Computers do not work properly. Toilets are not maintained properly. Dissatisfied with the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best knowledge to students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides internships in the final year. The average salary offered is Rs. 54,000 per month.

reviews.review_heading: The college is absolutely not good for law students.
reviews.review_text: The library is not updated for a very long time. Books are too old and not a sufficient collection of books are there. The classrooms are average. You should not expect smart classrooms here. Wi-Fi is not good. There is no canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for physiotherapy.
reviews.review_text: There are many hostels in our college. There are separate hostels for girls and boys.  Wi-Fi is available for students to study. There are many cultural activities and events. There is a library for students to study there.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. I suggest you take admission here to make your career.
reviews.review_text: It has excellent Wi-Fi speed, good labs, and well-seated classrooms. The library environment is very good, and it has knowledgeable books. The hostel quality is good. The food served is just like home food. There is also a huge canteen in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, well-equipped with ventilation and Wi-Fi. The food is decent. The variety in food is good, and they give you three meals a day and tea two times a day. The hostel fee is affordable, even the hostel facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a bit above average college.
reviews.review_text: There is no boys hostel on the main city campus. There is no Wi-Fi in college. There is no ground on the main city campus. It has PGs around it, so you can live nearby with freedom.

reviews.review_heading: This university is good but not for every course.
reviews.review_text: This college has a small campus, but the way they have utilised that small space is good. Hostels still do not have a washroom on one floor, but it will be built in a couple of years. There is no canteen and no sports and games in this college. The food served in a hostel is very good.

college_info.intro:
Guru Kashi University offers a large diversity of courses to students at its campus. Students can access UG programs, among which the popular courses include BBA, BEd, BVoc, among others. The Bachelor of Arts (BA) GKU course is available to students in a large collection of specializations.
Students can pursue higher education with PG programs like MBA (Agribusiness), MA, MTech, MEd, among others. Students seeking to pursue research and doctorate fields can choose from the various PhD programs at GKU Bathinda.
