review_summary.college_name: Guru Kashi University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best universities in Punjab to do the BCA course.

content.Placements: 70% of students in my course get selected. The highest package is 6.5 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. The average package ranges from 3-3.5 LPA. Honda and Tech Mahindra are the top companies that visit the college to hire students from my course. 60% of students got internships from my course in the HDFC Bank. The top role offered is a manager.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in my department are excellent. It has a 24x7 Wi-Fi facility. There are many labs for different subjects. Classrooms are good. There is a huge library in which more than 500 students can study at one time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied by the mess food quality, roads, and the college life.

content.Placements: About 50 to 60% of students get placed in my course. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA, and the average is 3.50 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Wipro, Kent, Nestled, etc. About 70 to 80% of the students get internships. Top roles are AI ML, and web development.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Classrooms are also good, and Wi-Fi is available in hostel libraries. The hostel facilities is good, and the mess food quality is good in some hostels, and in some hostels it is bad. The sports tournament is held at our university every year. The canteen is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are more experienced and now there are new facilities.

content.Placements: Placements are not that enough. Around 2-3% of students got placements. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the minimum is 2 LPA. There are many companies like JU, Prabhat Seeds, etc. In this course, the top roles are to manage the agricultural field, pesticide distribution, safe use, and many banking jobs like assistant manager are there.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the course and the college are good as well. The labs and fields are there for better knowledge. Staff is also good but the new staff is just okay not that much good. Hostel looks good but I never lived in a hostel. The food of the hostel is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college.

content.Placements: It is a great university where many students secure placements after finishing their studies. Last year, many students achieved about 100 out of 30-40. So, it is a nice university you can check out if you want to pursue a degree or master’s in any field.
content.Infrastructure: It has many buildings and departments according to different fields, and each department is very well maintained. There are plenty of canteens around the departments for lunch, as well as a library, computer lab, etc. It also has a park.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best university in Punjab, and all faculty members are good.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed here. The highest package here is 10 LPA, and the lowest package ranges from 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and Amazon. Around 80% of students secure internships in companies like Microsoft, Deloitte, and startups.
content.Infrastructure: The department offers a well-equipped lab, Wi-Fi, best classroom, and a smart library with ample resources. Hostels have decent facilities including clean rooms, attached bathrooms, Wi-Fi, and study space. The mess food is average but hygienic. Medical facilities are available. Gym is also there.

admission_overview.college_name: Guru Kashi University Admission 2025: Process, Eligibility, Dates

paragraphs: Guru Kashi University has over 100 courses in 16 domains that are offered at the UG, PG, & PhD levels.
Find below the eligibility and selection criteria:
Guru Kashi University 2025- Admission Process
Find below the detailed process for Guru Kashi University admissions 2025:
1: Guru Kashi University Application Process 2025

Just so you know – the filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Guru Kashi University. However, the application & entrance test fee will be paid online & candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the 2 copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
2: Selection Rounds
Admission to all the PG courses at Guru Kashi University is entrance-based.
3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After completing all the selection rounds, candidates must appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of the Guru Kashi University fee to secure their seats.

headings.text: 2025 Guru Kashi University Admission: Eligibility and others

courses_data.name: Guru Kashi University BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Guru Kashi University's BE/BTech programme offers 300 seats across various disciplines like Mechanical, Petroleum, Civil, Computer Science, and Electrical Engineering. Eligibility requires a 50% score in CBSE 12th or equivalent exams. With 60 seats allocated to each specialisation, students can pursue their desired field in engineering at Guru Kashi University.

faqs.question: Can I join Guru Kashi University - GKU without JEE Mains?
faqs.answer: Every course at Guru Kashi University has different eligibility criteria for admission purposes.For B.tech the candidate must have done his class 12 from a recognised board. The university also accepts LEET which is a state-level lateral entry entrance test.For Mtech the candidate should have a minimum of 50% marks in the Bachelor of the same course.For an MBA, the candidate must have completed his graduation from a recognized university.For PhD, the admission is based on the entrance test.For o

faqs.question: What is the procedure to take BTech admission at Guru Kashi University - GKU?
faqs.answer: The procedure to get admission in any course at Guru Kashi University (GTU) is through entrance examinations like CMAT, CAT etc. On the basis of marks attained in these entrance examinations a merit list is created and that would be the deciding factor of whether or not you would be getting a seat in GTU.In order to get admission in B.Tech one should give JEE Mains and advanced examination. Scoring a decent rank will led to your name in the merit list and ultimately an admission in GTU

courses_data.name: Guru Kashi University MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Guru Kashi University's MBA/PGDM programme in Agri Business Management for 2025 offers 75 seats. Eligibility requires a 45% score in both graduation and CBSE 12th exams. The programme accepts scores from CAT, MAT, XAT, and CMAT exams.

faqs.question: Does Guru Kashi University - GKU accept CAT for MBA?
faqs.answer: Guru Kashi University is one of the top MBA colleges in India. It is a 2-year full time program. Yes, it accepts CAT ( Common Admission Test) for MBA but it's not compulsory to give thai exam. CAT exam is an entrances exam which is widely accepted in manh colleges but it is not mandatory for all MBA admission. You can also find many other alternatives for CAT like CMAT, GMAT, MAT and XATXAT entrance exam which are also accepted by many colleges.

faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at Guru Kashi University expensive?
faqs.answer: Punjab, India, starts at INR 2 Lacs and can go up to INR 25 Lacs per year.Some say the fees are expensive, with the first and second semesters costing INR 62,580 and the second year costing INR 60,580

faqs.question: When I can apply for Guru Kashi University MBA courses?
faqs.answer: Guru Kashi University is going to open its admission portal for the academic batch 2025. Currently, candidates can raise an inquiry for admission but the application process has not been started yet. Prospective candidates should keep a check on Guru Kashi University MBA admission dates from the official website of the university or can directly reach to university's admission office.

faqs.question: Can I take direct admissions to BCom courses at Guru Kashi University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Kashi University offers merit-based admission to BCom. Candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria and apply on the official website of the university. After all the procedures the institute releases its merit list. If the candidates are shortlisted on merit then they have to pay the admission fee to lock their final seats.

placement_report.college_name: Guru Kashi University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Guru Kashi University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The highest package offered during Guru Kashi University placements in recent past stood at INR 100 LPA . The top recruiters in recent past included U Mumba , PlanetSpark and TCS

faqs.question: Is Guru Kashi University good for placements?
faqs.answer: Placements are good, approximately 90% of students get placed. Top companies come and recruit the students. It is the top recruiting university. The highest package offered here was 7 LPA and Average package is around 2-3 LPA and good packages are offered. Roles such as marketing are offered in the agriculture course.

faqs.question: Does Guru Kashi University offers internships to MBA students?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Kashi University does offer internships to MBA students. There are a number of documents and PdF on the university's official website that include information about the placement cell and internship opportunities given by the university. However, GKU Bathinda does not specify the duration of internships for MBA students.

faqs.question: Are MBA placements at Guru Kashi University good?
faqs.answer: Almost every student at Guru Kashi University (GKU) gets placement in top MNCs. The average package is around INR 3 lakhs, the highest package is around INR 6,50,000 lakhs, and the minimum salary for the students is INR 1,50,000 per annum.

faqs.question: Are there any govt. job opportunities that I can seek after completing BCom from Guru Kashi University?
faqs.answer: Yes, students who are pursuing their BCom degree from Guru Kashi University can apply to various government job. They can look forward to placements related to Finance, Auditing, Financial Administration, Taxation, etc. For most of the government jobs, graduates are required to appear for competitive exams conducted by various recruiting organisations. Tabulated below are some prospective government jobs for BCom graduates along with their average salaries: Bank Probationary Officer (PO): INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA LIC AAO: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS Clerk: INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA RRB NTPC: INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA SSC CHSL: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS PO: INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned salary package are industry-based average payouts. The actual salary may vary.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best universities in Punjab to do the BCA course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my department are excellent. It has a 24x7 Wi-Fi facility. There are many labs for different subjects. Classrooms are good. There is a huge library in which more than 500 students can study at one time.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied by the mess food quality, roads, and the college life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Classrooms are also good, and Wi-Fi is available in hostel libraries. The hostel facilities is good, and the mess food quality is good in some hostels, and in some hostels it is bad. The sports tournament is held at our university every year. The canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are more experienced and now there are new facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the course and the college are good as well. The labs and fields are there for better knowledge. Staff is also good but the new staff is just okay not that much good. Hostel looks good but I never lived in a hostel. The food of the hostel is not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college.
reviews.review_text: It has many buildings and departments according to different fields, and each department is very well maintained. There are plenty of canteens around the departments for lunch, as well as a library, computer lab, etc. It also has a park.

reviews.review_heading: Best university in Punjab, and all faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The department offers a well-equipped lab, Wi-Fi, best classroom, and a smart library with ample resources. Hostels have decent facilities including clean rooms, attached bathrooms, Wi-Fi, and study space. The mess food is average but hygienic. Medical facilities are available. Gym is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, but placement percentage is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best, and the buildings are superb. You can get free Wi-Fi, advanced labs, and a library here, but the classrooms are average not bad, but not the best. Hostels are good, and the food is also good. I was living in Shivalik Hostel, and that was awesome. Sports ground, medical facilities, and games, everything is good.

reviews.review_heading: The university is very good, the faculty is very good, but the placement is not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. There are two types of hostels, on-campus and off-campus. For off-campus hostels, two-seater and three-seater rooms are available. The campus has Wi-Fi, mess, and canteen facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and Supportive behaviour of the Staffs
reviews.review_text: Hostels are divided into three facilities :- A/C, Cooler, and fan. There are two playgrounds for the students to play. It is fully covered by wifi . Meals are awesome. Wardens are more supportive. There are central library, and many computer labs are available.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied because there is no good infrastructure, campus and management.
reviews.review_text:
Hostels are not good not bad, just average. 
But college infrastructure like labs and classrooms is not good, and sittings are also bad.
The main issue in summers is no proper fan working and in labs there is no AC.
In classrooms, there are only 5 fans, and strength of the students is 60.

reviews.review_heading: A glance of GKU. Faculty is very cooperative.
reviews.review_text: The labs are equipped with modern instruments but we rarely use them. Classes are normal at any school in the city. There is no air conditioning in classes. Wi-Fi facility only for faculty members. Projectors are there in some classrooms. The boys hostel rooms have attached washrooms, while the girls hostel does not. Average medical facilities are there. Mess food is very bad. Sports and game facilities are the best. Our university will rank 5th in Khelo, India, in 2023.

reviews.review_heading: If you have a budget above INR 4 lakhs for MBA, don't consider GKU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Classes are equipped with fans but no ACs. Yes, we have projectors in classrooms but no proper board for that. There is one smart lab & computer lab, but again with limited facilities. Yes, the quality of food in the hostel mess is good but rooms are overcrowded with 4 boys in a single room.

reviews.review_heading: Great Faculty and family-like College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our course, such as Books, Materials, Records, and Bluebooks for internals, we should pay for. In classrooms, there are Fans and Smart-TVs. The Library offers all facilities. Classrooms are large and spacious. The Hostel facilities are great. They offer more facilities, like food in the Mess. The quality of food in Mess is good. Medical facilities and many facilities. The Infrastructure of the College is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty and facilities offered by the GKU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the GKU available for the MBA was good. The college had a pretty big and beautiful campus. Facilities like Wi-Fi, computers, labs, libraries, canteens, halls, auditoriums, etc. were given to the students. A hostel was available for the students of the college. The facilities offered at the college were above average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Kashi University.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available in our classrooms with developed infrastructure. Digital classrooms are available with free Wi-Fi facilities. Many sports facilities are available in our college. The mess available in our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a mind-blowing university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is mind-blowing. Hostel gives a homely feeling home. Food served in the mess is very good. Physical education is good. All the facilities are available in the mess. Doctor is available at the university. Library and computer lab are available.

paragraphs: The application fee for BPharm courses at Guru Kashi University, also called registration fees ranges between INR 2,800 and INR 3,000. The total tuition fees for the BPharm course at GKU Bhatinda range from INR 2.1 Lacs to INR 3.2 lakh. Additionally,  the hostel fees is INR 1.95 lakh.The above-mentioned fees are sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.
The following are the Guru Kashi University scholarship programs:

2.       Single Girl Child Scholarship

4.       Bhamashah Card Yojana Scholarship
5.       Old and New Students Details - Scholarship Policy

table.details: Advanced Diploma in Collaboration with Fergusson College

college_info.intro:
Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute offers an Advanced Diploma programme to students as its flagship course. The college offers this programme to students in collaboration with the Fergusson College. Further, the college offers an advanced diploma programme in full-time mode, across several specialisations such as Advertising Communication Design, Landscape Design, Interior Design, etc.
Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute courses are offered to students for a duration of 2 years. Candidates seeking a career in the Arts, Design, Photography, and Hospitality fields can pursue this course. The career options available after pursuing this course are Graphic Designer, UI/UX, Freelance Designer, Site Planner, Horticulturist, Interior Designer, and many more. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at JRVGTI Pune in the table provided below:

admission_process.title: Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JRVGTI -Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Instituteadmissions 2025are merit-based. The college offers diversity of courses mainly in four streams, namely Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Hospitality & Travel and Beauty & Photography. Students can pursue certificate courses such as Digital photography, Gemmology and Diamond Grading, Travel atJagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute. However, another option is to pursue Advance Diploma in Collaboration with Fergusson College in a wide range of specialisations such as Interior Design, Landscape Design and Advertising and Communication Desing (Graphic Design).

JRVGTI admissions are merit-based for both Certificate and Diploma level courses. Candidates must meet the basic educational requirements of the courses at the time of admission. More course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute course admissions 2025 are as follows:
Know more aboutJagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute courses
Download:JRVGTI Brochure 2025
The following section mentions the step-wise details forJagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

The registration process for Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute certification courses and those offered under Advanced Diploma in Collaboration With Fergusson College is conducted in an online mode by visiting the offcial website of the respective colleges.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute admissions are completely merit-based. Students are admitted based on their past academic scores obtained in Class 12. This eligibility criteria is common for all Diploma and Certification programmes offered at the college. Moreover, eligible students are offered admission based on first-come-first-serve basis.
Step 3: Final Admission
At last, the finalised students must pay the course fee to confirm their admissions.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma In Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college and would recommend joining it.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed in our course. It is a paramedical course and these technicians play a major role in diagnosing various alignments. The average salary package offered is 1 LPA to 5 LPA. Placements are provided in both government and private hospitals in our course. The roles offered are research technician, lab consultant, technologist, research assistant, lab analyst, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are convenient for students to study. Hostels are built inside and outside the institute. Food served in the hostel is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Fashion Technology (Advance) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is the right place to pursue fashion designing.

review_content.Placements: I have done an advanced Diploma in fashion technology from YWCA. The packages offered are good (1.5 to 5 LPA). The teachers train the students for interviews. Around 70 to 80% of students got placed. I got placed in Uniform Bucket as a fashion merchandiser.
review_content.Infrastructure: YWCA is a pocket-friendly place, where you can get really good knowledge, both theoretical and practical. The teachers are good and friendly. Computer and personality development classes are also conducted with the course. I am from Meerut. I shifted to Delhi and stayed in the YWCA hostel. The hostel is a perfect place to stay for college students. Mess and all the other facilities are good.

individual_reviews.title: The fee structure of this college is not reasonable.

content.Placements: Many students got internships in this course. Placements are decent. There are no top recruiting companies that visit our college for recruitment. Top roles are offered in this course. Few students got unpaid internships in this course.

Sports are not conducted. Medical facilities are not available. Washrooms are average. Classrooms are not well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma In Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college and would recommend joining it.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed in our course. It is a paramedical course and these technicians play a major role in diagnosing various alignments. The average salary package offered is 1 LPA to 5 LPA. Placements are provided in both government and private hospitals in our course. The roles offered are research technician, lab consultant, technologist, research assistant, lab analyst, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are convenient for students to study. Hostels are built inside and outside the institute. Food served in the hostel is average.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Fashion Technology (Advance) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is the right place to pursue fashion designing.

content.Placements: I have done an advanced Diploma in fashion technology from YWCA. The packages offered are good (1.5 to 5 LPA). The teachers train the students for interviews. Around 70 to 80% of students got placed. I got placed in Uniform Bucket as a fashion merchandiser.
content.Infrastructure: YWCA is a pocket-friendly place, where you can get really good knowledge, both theoretical and practical. The teachers are good and friendly. Computer and personality development classes are also conducted with the course. I am from Meerut. I shifted to Delhi and stayed in the YWCA hostel. The hostel is a perfect place to stay for college students. Mess and all the other facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Office Management - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Perfectly satisfied from YWCA of Delhi.

content.Placements: About 50 students were in my class and there were four sections of office management course. 40-50 students were in each section. When I was studying in YWCA. I did the internship also for one month in central Water Commission (CWC) and after completing the course minimum package offer was 15-20 thousand. When I completed the course before that only the covid pandemic started so till the lockdown no placement was provided but I am fully satisfied that even after one year of passing out from the college the teachers and the placement department is still in touch with us and are still providing the required jobs. Each and every student got internship from the college as it's compulsory for every student to do internship before completing the course and the companies were Dabor Ltd. , Central Water Commission, BSES. Office coordinator, office assistant, front office executive, these were the roles offered.

faqs.answer: A:    National Institute of Design (NID) Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh offers 1 Course in 3 streams. The courses are, B.Des. in Communication Design, B.Des. in Industrial Design, and B.Des. in Textile and Apparel Design. Admission is given to 75 students only.Admission is based on the design aptitude test, a national entrance test for admissions, conducted by the institute. The eligibility is that a candidate must have cleared class 12th in any discipline from a recognized board.
faqs.question: Are admissions at NID Vijaywada/ National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh entrance-based or merit-based?

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot enrol directly in NID Vijayawada or the National Institute of Design in Andhra Pradesh. NID Vijayawada admits students through a two-stage admission test procedure. The first step is the national exam administered by NID, called the Design Aptitude Test (DAT). The interview and design portfolio constitute the second phase.You must have received at least a 50% grade in your class 12 Diploma from an accredited board in order to be eligible for the DAT. Any of the three NID Vijaywada-offered disciplines—industrial design, textile and apparel design, and communication design—may be applied for the DAT.You will be placed for the design portfolio and interview if you pass the DAT. Your design expertise and skills should be on display in your portfolio. You might talk about your reason for pursuing a career in design as well as your design portfolio during the interview.Admittance is extremely competitive; only a small portion of candidates are chosen. On the other hand, your chances of success are higher if you have a strong portfolio and are passionate about design.
faqs.question: Can I join NID Vijayawada/ National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh, directly?

faqs.answer: A:     National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh or NID Vijayawada (NID Andhra Pradesh or NID Andhra Pradesh) admission is closed for admission session 2022. The NID DAT result for BDes was announced on July 27. Candidates who have been shortlisted as NID DAT 2022 scores are invited to attend counselling.
faqs.question: Can I apply for BDes at NID Andhra Pradesh now?

faqs.answer: A:    The NID Vijayawada offers undergraduate programmes at the Rs. 7.51 Lacs fee. Communication Design, Industrial Design and Textile & Apparel Design courses are offered in NID Vijayawada. The National Institute of Design Andhra Pradesh Vijayawada provides 75 seats every year for all undergraduate courses.The competent authority has approved the below fees for the academic year 2022-23 forB.Des Programme is 1,97,700

faqs.answer: No, direct admission to the Bachelor of Design (B.Des) programme at NID Vijayawada, also known as the National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh, is not possible. Admission to the B.Des programme is based on the Design and Aptitude Test (DAT), and candidates have to appear for the NID DAT entrance exam to enroll in the B.Des program. There is no other way or any other entrance examination accepted by NID Vijayawada for admission to B.Des.

Admission to the BDes programme is granted on the basis of the Design and Aptitude Test(DAT)administered to all NIDs in major cities across the country.

The National Institute of Design (NID) isinternationally knownas one of the finest educational and research institutions for Industrial, Communication, and Textile Design. NID Vijayawada, AP is among thesevenNIDs of India. Students admitted to the BDes programme atNID Vijayawadaare required to attend amandatoryFoundation Programmeforoneyear.

courses_data.description: The Bachelor of Design programme, which is four years in duration at NID Vijayawada. The specialisations are, BDes in Communication Design, BDes in Industrial Design, and BDes in Text and Appreal Design of four years' duration. Students can get into BDes based on a valid score on the DAT exam. Check out the following information to know the eligibility, accepted entrance exam, fee, and seats of the NID Vijaywada BDes programme:

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to B.Des at NID Vijayawada/ National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.answer: No, direct admission to the Bachelor of Design (B.Des) programme at NID Vijayawada, also known as the National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh, is not possible. Admission to the B.Des programme is based on the Design and Aptitude Test (DAT), and candidates have to appear for the NID DAT entrance exam to enroll in the B.Des program. There is no other way or any other entrance examination accepted by NID Vijayawada for admission to B.Des.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does NID Vijaywada/ National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh accept for admission to B.Des?
faqs.answer: The National Institute of Design (NID) Vijayawada acceptsNID DAT scoresfor admission to B.Des. The minimum cutoff for B.Des in 2023 was 50 marks for the General category. The cutoff for three B.Des specializations, including Communication Design, Industrial Design, and Textile and Apparel Design, was 62.2.To be considered for admission, candidates must appear in both DAT Prelims and DAT Mains. A merit list is created for each category based on the results of DAT Prelims. Candidates are then call

faqs.question: Are admissions at NID Vijaywada/ National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: National Institute of Design (NID) Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh offers 1 Course in 3 streams. The courses are, B.Des. in Communication Design, B.Des. in Industrial Design, and B.Des. in Textile and Apparel Design. Admission is given to 75 students only.Admission is based on the design aptitude test, a national entrance test for admissions, conducted by the institute.The eligibility is that a candidate must have cleared class 12th in any discipline from a recognized board.

faqs.question: Can I join NID Vijayawada/ National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh, directly?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot enrol directly in NID Vijayawada or the National Institute of Design in Andhra Pradesh. NID Vijayawada admits students through a two-stage admission test procedure. The first step is the national exam administered by NID, called the Design Aptitude Test (DAT). The interview and design portfolio constitute the second phase.You must have received at least a 50% grade in your class 12 Diploma from an accredited board in order to be eligible for the DAT. Any of the three NID Vijaywada-offered disciplines—industrial design, textile and apparel design, and communication design—may be applied for the DAT.You will be placed for the design portfolio and interview if you pass the DAT. Your design expertise and skills should be on display in your portfolio. You might talk about your reason for pursuing a career in design as well as your design portfolio during the interview.Admittance is extremely competitive; only a small portion of candidates are chosen. On the other hand, your c

faqs.question: How many students can do B.Des at NID Vijaywada/ National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.answer: The National Institute of Design (NID) Vijayawada accepts 75 students per year for its B.Des program. The B.Des programme is a four-year course offered in three specializations. The first two semesters are a Design Foundation Programme, followed by six semesters of study.Candidates must meet the requirements established by the institute to be considered for admission. Students who have passed 10+2 in any stream can apply for admission to the B.Des course at NID Vijayawada.

hostel_campus.college_name: NID Vijayawada Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The institute operates from a transit campus and it does not have its own hostels. However, the Institute facilitates secure hostel accommodation (housing estate) 1 km away from the campus. Apart from the living quarters, there are facilities such as a night guard, doctor on call, vehicle 24/7 for any medical emergencies, a mess facility which caters to the cultural diversity of India, and a common room with necessary appliances. The housing estate also provides amenities such as ATMs, Pharmacy, Post Office, Department stores, and both Indoor and Outdoor recreational areas. Amalgamation of cultures throughout India and celebration of pan Indian festivals.

data.description: Within the GATE complex, there is a Boy's Hostel, a Girl's Hostel, and an adjacent Mess facility. There are 208 rooms available in the hostel, which can house up to 292 students.  There are amenities like a doctor on call, a car for any medical emergency, a dining facility that accommodates the cultural variety of India, and a common area with utilitarian and recreational equipment in addition to the residential quarters and GATE site. Wide, lush grounds surrounded the school to provide a better setting for students' personal growth.

college_info.intro:
Raffles Design International Mumbai provides various diploma, advanced diploma, and UG programmes affiliated with Raffles College of Higher Education and Coventry University UK. The institute provides around 20 courses. Some of these courses include
1. A Diploma in Fashion Design
2. An Advanced Diploma in Fashion Design
3. BA. (Hons) in Fashion Design
4. A Diploma in Interior Design
5. An Advanced Diploma in Interior Design
6. A BA (Hons) in Interior Design
7. Diploma in Product Design
8. Advanced Diploma in Product Design
9. BA (Hons) in Product Design, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Raffles Design International Mumbai admission to all the courses is merit-based. Applicants are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria and apply online on the official website. The final seat allotment is based on the last qualifying mark score. The college offers direct admission based on the last qualifying marks scores.

faqs.answer: A:    Raffles Design International Mumbai offers BA under nine specialisations,  some of the specialisations are BA (Hon) in Interior Design, BA (Hons) in Fashion Design, BA (Hons.) in Product Design, BA (Hons) in Visual Communication Design, BA (Hons) in Digital Media Design, etc. The total tuition fee for a BA at Raffles Design Mumbai is INR 19 Lakh for three years. individual_reviews.course: Advanced Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good teaching, placements and infrastructure facilities.

content.Placements: Raffles is a great place in terms of design teaching, conceptualization and originality. For internships, it provides a list of design companies that have hired students from Raffles in the past, which becomes an advantage for current students. Presently in this pandemic, every interior design student has managed to secure a suitable position in a reputable firm.
content.Infrastructure: Currently, Raffles is situated on the ground floor of WeWork, providing all the facilities like a coffee vending machine, Wi-Fi, centralised air-conditioning and miscellaneous things as basic stationery. It maintains a clean, healthy and pest-free environment. It does not provide hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Advanced Diploma in Fashion Design - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good learning experience.

content.Placements: Most of the students got internships because of the help of faculty members. Internships give an idea as to what to expect in the industry. Designer and merchandiser are some of the popular roles that we apply for as a student of fashion design. The course is very helpful in giving me a boost to start my own business.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very well-equipped for the fashion design course. It is well maintained, and we get the appropriate training to use the equipment needed for course. Classrooms are very convenient, and the library is adequately equipped to deal with our course. Proper printing facilities and Wi-Fi ensures ease of doing work in the classroom.

individual_reviews.course: Advanced Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college trains students for the future design world.

content.Infrastructure: The quality of the facilities provided is pretty good. There are facilities like a PC lab, good Wi-Fi, drafting boards, workshops for product design, and we also had the equipment required while dealing with physical models. There is safety ensured at all times. The college is also a very clean and hygienic place to be in.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and the facilities provided by the college is perfect. AC classrooms, Wi-Fi, workshop, labs, library, xerox machine. So that the students won't have to go out. Students enjoy studying on the campus. The classrooms are very well maintained so the students can work without any hesitation.

individual_reviews.course: Advanced Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: In our college, most of the faculty members are foreigners.

content.Placements: Our college provides almost all kinds of companies for placements for us so that we get at least one job at someplace. Even in this COVID-19 situation, we are provided with a lot of companies which offered work from home facility. So, our college has such a great impression. If we have a degree from Raffles, then it has a very good reputation.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is in WeWork, so there is a perfect infrastructure as they have designed it according to our needs. There are no hostels, but there are many good flats nearby which are available at reasonable prices. There are a lot of turfs to play cricket and football, and we play the rest of all sports in WeWork.

Students can pursue various programmes, such as Dual International Certificate, Advanced Diploma in Business Management, a Bachelor's degree in Business Management from Singapore or Australia. Mode of study
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered

Raffles Design International Mumbai provides diplomas, advance diploma, short-term certificates and other courses.The table below presents the qualifying examination/Selection criteria and the eligibility criteria for admission to the programmes offered at Raffles Design International Mumbai:
Course Name
Certificate
Candidate must have cleared Class 10 with at least 65% passing marks
- IETLS score of 5.5 for Diploma, or TOEFL (Internet-based) 46
- Candidate must have a portfolio with at least 5 pieces of work, depending on the field of interest
Advanced Diploma
- Candidate must have completed 16 Years of age.
- Candidate must have cleared Class 10 with at least 65% passing marks.
- IETLS score of 5.5 for Diploma, or TOEFL (Internet-based) 46.
- Portfolio with at least 5 pieces of work, depending on field of interest.
Merit-Based

Raffles Design International Mumbai admission is both entrance and merit-based. Candidates seeking admission have to complete each of the admission stages for admission. Find below more details on the Raffles Design International Mumbai admission procedures:
STEP 1: Raffles Design International Mumbai Application Process 2025

The institute accepts applications via online modes. For online applications, aspirants can visit the institute's official website. To apply successfully, the application fee must be paid within the due date.
STEP 2: Raffles Design International Mumbai Selection Round

After applying, the admission panel examines the candidates based on their scores in TOEFL or IELTS. Apart from this candidate's age, qualifying exam score & portfolio as per the field of interest are also examined.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Selected students can pay the required amount of Raffles Design International Mumbai fee to confirm their seats.

library.description: Raffles provides a fully stocked design library for students to use at their leisure.
Raffles provides a fully stocked design library for students to use at their leisure.

cafeteria.description: Complimentary Tea/Coffee available at all times

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good teaching, placements and infrastructure facilities.
reviews.review_text: Currently, Raffles is situated on the ground floor of WeWork, providing all the facilities like a coffee vending machine, Wi-Fi, centralised air-conditioning and miscellaneous things as basic stationery. It maintains a clean, healthy and pest-free environment. It does not provide hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good learning experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very well-equipped for the fashion design course. It is well maintained, and we get the appropriate training to use the equipment needed for course. Classrooms are very convenient, and the library is adequately equipped to deal with our course. Proper printing facilities and Wi-Fi ensures ease of doing work in the classroom.

reviews.review_heading: Our college trains students for the future design world.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the facilities provided is pretty good. There are facilities like a PC lab, good Wi-Fi, drafting boards, workshops for product design, and we also had the equipment required while dealing with physical models. There is safety ensured at all times. The college is also a very clean and hygienic place to be in.

reviews.review_heading: The course offers a detailed explanation of all the subjects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and the facilities provided by the college is perfect. AC classrooms, Wi-Fi, workshop, labs, library, xerox machine. So that the students won't have to go out. Students enjoy studying on the campus. The classrooms are very well maintained so the students can work without any hesitation.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, most of the faculty members are foreigners.
reviews.review_text: Our college is in WeWork, so there is a perfect infrastructure as they have designed it according to our needs. There are no hostels, but there are many good flats nearby which are available at reasonable prices. There are a lot of turfs to play cricket and football, and we play the rest of all sports in WeWork.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a good and pleasing infrastructure. Teachers are your friends.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a good range of facilities. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The college has printing facilities including colour, black and white. We also have stationeries, etc. A good range of books is available in the library which students and teachers can access.
